name: Absorb
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user takes nutrients from the nearest source of life they find. Single Target. The User restores HP equal to half the damage dealt, rounded down.

name: Accelerock
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon dashes at great speed using the rocks on their body to strike the foe upon impact. Single Target. Reaction 1.

name: Acid
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon spits an acidic gunk into the foe that immediately gives burning sensation. Keep away from the eyes and wash with abundant water. Target All Foes in Range. Roll 1 Chance die to Reduce by 1 the Sp. Defense of those affected.

name: Acid Armor
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Highly acidic goop oozes through the pores of this Pokémon. Touching it immediately causes a burning pain. Preventing foes from getting too close. Target Self. Increase the User's Defense by 2.

name: Acid Downpour
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Roll 3 Chance Dice to Poison, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Acid Spray
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Do not point at face or eyes. Keep away from children. Single Target. Projectile Move. Reduce the Target's Sp. Defense by 2.

name: Acrobatics
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon is quick and graceful, they cartwheel, contort and make a double back jump before landing onthe foe. Their best perfomance is done when they are unburdened. Single Target. *If the User has a Held Item, Reduce 2 Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move.

name: Acupressure
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user begins pushing pressure points on their body to unlock a hidden potential they didn’t even knew they had. Target Self. Increase by 1 one of the User's Attributes or Traits at Random (Strength, Dexterity, Special, Defense, Sp. Defense, Accuracy, Evasion). If this Move is used again, the previous Attribute increase is removed.

name: Aerial Ace
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon rises up in the air towards a light source, momentarily blinding the foe. then plummets quickly to attack the opponent Single Target. Cutter Move. Never Miss.

name: Aeroblast
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The victim is trapped in a violently swirling vortex. The strong wind currents make debris fly everywhere. Single Target. Wind Move. Lethal. High Critical. Unique.

name: After You
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user bows and courteously lets a friend go first. Target One Ally. Reaction 1. The Target will go First in the Initiative Order. If used again, the previous target reverts to their original Initiative order. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Agility
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Swift of body, swift of mind. Target Self. Increase the User's Dexterity by 2.

name: Air Cutter
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A sharp wide wave of wind is sent out , everyone can feel it slicing throught their midsection. Target All Foes in Range. High Critical. Wind Move. Cutter Move.

name: Air Slash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A compressed wind-slash, the change of pressure knocks out the target momentarily Single Target. Cutter Move. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target.

name: All-Out Pummeling
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Remove Barriers, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Alluring Voice
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Since ancient times, sailors have warned against the siren’s alluring voice calling out for you in the middle of the sea. Now you know why. Single Target. Sound Move. Confuse the Target.

name: Ally Switch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user vanishes just as they were about to be hit, and suddenly there’s another Pokémon in their place. Di-Did the user disappear? Or was it never there to begin with? Target Self. Reaction 3. Switcher Move for the User. If successful, restore the Action this Move costed and the switched ally may use a Reaction when they enter the field.

name: Ambush
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Sneak through the shadows, stay low to the ground, and prepare yourself to pounce on an unsuspecting foe. Single Target. Before the Battle starts, Target may resist by rolling: Insight + Alert and scoring the same or more Successes. The User has 1 Action before Initiatives are rolled in which the Target can't act. Other foes can still Evade or Clash during this time.

name: Amnesia
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 No thoughts. Head empty Target Self. Increase the User's Sp. Defense by 2.

name: Anchor Shot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon hurls an anchor at the foe and entangles it with seaweed, the anchor drags the foe down so it cannot escape. Single Target. Ranged. Blocks. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Ancient Power
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon calls forward an energy from the ancient past. This may infuse the user with a primal strength. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Increase by 1 the User's Strength, Dexterity, Special, Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Apple Acid
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon produces a sap from the tart apples they feed on, if the apples are not ripe their sap will be acidic and bad for teeth. Single Target. Reduce the Foe's Sp. Defense by 1.

name: Aqua Cutter
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The User compacts water and shoots it as a pressurized jet. This jet is very sharp and can easily cut through solids. Single Target. Ranged. High Critical. Cutter Move.

name: Aqua Jet
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon propels themselves with a jet of pressured water. Single Target. Reaction 1.

name: Aqua Ring
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon coats themselves in fresh water. Target Self. The User heals 1 HP at the end of each Round. Spend 1 Will point to activate. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Aqua Step
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The most fluid dance steps you’ll ever see. The user toys with their target by kicking and splashing around. Single Target. Increase the User's Dexterity by 1.

name: Aqua Tail
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user sways their tail to create a pocket whirlpool in which the foe gets sucked in by the spinning motion. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target.

name: Arm Thrust
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A quick and relentless series of open-palmed thrusts against the foe. Single Target. Successive Actions.

name: Armor Cannon
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user shoots a mighty blast by using its own armor out as blazing projectiles. Single Target. Reduce by 1 the User's Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Aromatherapy
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon releases a series of essential oils and herbal scents to refresh themselves and their companions. Target User and Allies in Range. Cure Status Ailments (All Burn degrees, Freeze, Paralysis, All Poison & Sleep) on the Targets.

name: Aromatic Mist
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sprays an ally with a delicate aroma that makes everyone pull their punches against it. Target One Ally. Increase by 1 the Defense and Sp. Defense of the Target.

name: Assist
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user hurriedly remembers actions performed by others and mimics them. Some Pokémon can even imitate human tasks and help carry them out. Target One Ally. Copy Move. Choose one Move known by an Ally or member of your party, who may or may not be active in battle. You may choose another Target(s) for the Move. Unique Moves can't be copied.

name: Assurance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user indentifies the weakest foe and charges against them. Single Target. *Add 2 extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move if the Target has already received Damage from the User this Round.

name: Astonish
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user sneaks behind their target to jump scare them. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Foe.

name: Astral Barrage
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Call upon the restless spirits of the dead and send them to destroy your opponents. A truly frightening sight to witness. Target All Foes in Range. Lethal. Unique.

name: Attack Order
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The queen calls her swarm an heeds them to charge against you. No matter where you run, they will surround you. Hope you are not allergic to bees. Single Target. Ranged. High Critical.

name: Attract
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through their good looks and coquetish attitude, the Pokémon makes everyone develop a crush on them. Single Target. Target is now In Love with the User.

name: Aura Sphere
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 By channeling their own aura, the user launches an energy sphere that causes harm on an spiritual level more than a physical one. Single Target. Never Miss. Projectile Move.

name: Aura Wheel
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon happily runs into a wheel made of electricity that strikes the foe. If the user is feeling hungry the wheel’s energy is replaced by a dark aura. Single Target. Increase the user's Dexterity by 1. If the user of this Move is in "Hangry Form" this Move is considered Dark-Type.

name: Aurora Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots a beautiful shimmering beam that cools down a hot temper. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Reduce target's Strength by 1.

name: Aurora Veil
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 If the weather is cold enough, beautiful aurora lights will cover half of the battlefield, deflecting attacks. Target User's Side of the Field. Force Field against Physical & Special Damage. This move will fail if not performed under Hail/Snowy Weather. Duration 4 Rounds, even if Hail or Snow Weather is over.

name: Autotomize
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Rotating parts and tiny gears, the Pokémon works like a welloiled machine. Target Self. Increase the User's Dexterity by 2. Halve the User's weight.

name: Avalanche
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user covers themselves with a heavy snow coat, if anything disturbs the snow, it will fall like a heavy avalanche. Single Target. Late Reaction 4. *If the User received damage from the target during this Turn add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool. *If Snowy Weather is active add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool.

name: Axe Kick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user attacks by kicking up into the air and slamming its heel down upon the target leaving it both allured and scared. The heel may break if the kick fails. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Confuse the Target. If the Accuracy roll fails, Roll 4 Dice of Typeless Damage against the user, ignoring defenses.

name: Baby-Doll Eyes
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The biggest and brightest eyes, spakling with unshed tears, how can you say “no” to that?! Single Target. Reaction 1. Reduce Target's Strength by 1.

name: Baddy Bad
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon acts like a thug and channels its own dark aura as protection for itself and its allies. Single Target. After dealing damage, activate a Force Field against Physical Damage with a Duration of 4 Rounds on the User's side of the Field. If the user of this Move is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.

name: Baneful Bunker
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user encloses themselves inside a sturdy shell covered by poisonous barbs, if a barb pinches the Target’s skin, the wound will start to fester Target Self. Reaction 4. Shield Move. Reduce 3 Damage the User would receive from a Damaging Move. *If the Foe used a Non-Ranged Physical Move against the user, Poison the foe.

name: Barb Barrage
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user shoots a blast of venomous pins that inject venom into the foe, this venom is specially potent against those already compromised. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Poison the Target. *If the Target already has an active Status Condition, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move.

name: Barrage
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon throws whatever objects they find, one after the other to overwhelm the foe. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Ranged. Successive Actions. Projectile Move.

name: Barrier
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Whenever a foe attempts to to get too close to the user, they suddenly stop as if something ...or someone, prevented their movement. Target Self. Increase the User's Defense by 2.

name: Baton Pass
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon rallies through the battle, setting up everything for the next companion as they know this is a team effort. Target Self. Switcher Move for the User. Any Attribute increase on the user is passed on the next Pokemon. The user can't increase its own Attributes again until the end of the scene or until the switched Pokemon faints.

name: Beak Blast
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon gets ready to release a boiling gas through its beak, which gets incredibly hot. The resulting blast sounds like a train’s horn. Single Target. Charge Move. Ranged. Projectile Move. *If the User is hit by a Non-Ranged Physical Move while this Move is charging, inflict 2nd Degree Burn on the attacker.

name: Beat Up
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user calls other Pokémon to aid it in battle, together they give a beating to the foe. Single Target. *Add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move for every ally Pokemon that spends an action in addition to this Move, up to 3 allies may join.

name: Behemoth Bash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon becomes a giant energy shield that pushes back everything in its wake. If the foe is under the effects of the Dynamax phenomenon all its energy will be swept away Single Target. Unique. *If the Foe is under the effects of Dynamax/Gigantamax, This Move becomes Lethal and add 4 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool.

name: Behemoth Blade
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon becomes a giant sword with a razor-sharp blade. If the foe is under the effects of the Dynamax phenomenon all its energy will be slashed to bits. Single Target. Cutter Move. Unique. *If the Foe is under the effects of Dynamax/Gigantamax, This Move becomes Lethal and add 4 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool.

name: Belch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user shoots a blast of venomous pins that inject venom into the foe, this venom is specially potent against those already compromised. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Sound Move. The user must eat a berry or something similar during the Round before using this Move, otherwise it will fail. This effect only works once per berry/food eaten.

name: Belly Drum
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With an angry war cry the user hits their belly as drums of war. Target Self. Roll half of the User's HP as Typeless Damage Dice to itself, ignore defenses. Increase User's Strengt by 3.

name: Bestow
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon offers their own item to the foe to show their good manners. The foe keeps it as they don’t want to be seem as impolite. Single Target. Can't be used if Target is not holding an Item. The User gives its Held Item to the Target.

name: Bide
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user puts up with being hit, waiting for the perfect opportunity to retaliate. Single Target. The User will not Evade or Clash the next 2 Physical or Special Moves targeting it. Once all damage has been dealt against the User, roll a number of Normal-Type Damage dice equal to twice the total amount of Damage the Target received. Ignore Defenses.

name: Bind
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses all their strength to restrain to the foe and keep them in place. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Blocks. Ongoing Damage. Duration 4 Rounds. Increase the Target's difficultty to Evade at Storyteller's discretion.

name: Bite
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user lands a vicious bite, leaving an ugly bruise. Single Target. Bite Move. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Foe

name: Bitter Blade
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user focuses its bitter feelings towards the world of the living into a slashing attack, seeing the suffering it brings to others makes it feel reinvigorated. Single Target. Cutter Move. The User restores HP equal to half the damage dealt, rounded down.

name: Bitter Malice
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The victim is hit by an onslaught of evil energy. Filled with dread, the victim is unable to move. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Freeze the Foe. *If the Target already has an active Status Condition, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move.

name: Black Hole Eclipse
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Blast Burn
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon creates an enormous blast of infernal flames, surviving would be a miracle! Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Lethal. Must Recharge.

name: Blaze Kick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Setting their legs ablaze, the Pokémon throws a mighty kick that sears the sides of the foe. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. High Critical. Roll 2 Chance Dice to inflict 2nd Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Blazing Torque
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user is spun into a fiery torque with live flames on it! Single Target. Lethal. Ranged. Roll 3 Chance dice to inflict 2nd Degee Burn on the Target.

name: Bleakwind Storm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A furious storm ravages the battlefield, cold winds swirl in such a menacing way that you don’t know if the chill comes from the ice or the sheer terror invading you. Area Move. Low Accuracy 2. Lethal. Wind Move. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Freeze those affected.

name: Blizzard
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user summons a turbulent and gelid wind that feels like ice daggers. A pleasant day may make it difficult to call upon, but beware if the temperatures go below zero. All Foes in Range. Low Accuracy 2. Lethal. Wind Move. Roll 1 Chance Die to Freeze those affected. *Sunny Weather increases to Low Accuracy 4. **Hail/Snowy Weather remove Low Accuracy and adds the effect "Never Miss".

name: Block
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 You don’t seem to understand. I’m not blocked in here with you... You are blocked in here with me! Single Target. Blocks. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Blood Moon
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Blood Moon rises once again. When the glow of the bloodstained moon shines upon the land, the aimless spirits of slain monsters return to flesh. The world is threatened once again. Single Target. If this Move was used on the previous Round, it fails (Clashing counts as using the Move.)

name: Bloom Doom
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Heal 1 HP, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Blue Flare
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Reshiram surrounds itself with giant blue flame that is unleashed with an earth shattering explosion. Receiving this attack directly might competely engulf you in fire. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Lethal. Unique. Roll 2 Chance Dice to inflict 3rd Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Body Press
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon makes a judo maneuver, using its body mass instead of its strength against the target. Single Target.

name: Body Slam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user charges against the foe using ther body to slam it down, leaving the target stunned. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Paralyze the Target.

name: Bolt Beak
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon charges with its beak and pecks its foe. If the foe is not fast enough it will be zapped with a jolt of electricity. Single Target. *If this is the first Action of the Round for the User, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move

name: Bolt Strike
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Zekrom delivers a powerful tackle while discharging lightning through its body. The foe is rendered unable to move, either by the strike of the electricity. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Lethal. Unique. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Paralyze the foe.

name: Bone Club
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses a bone as a club to to smack their foe, a loud “Bonk!” sound can be heard. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target.

name: Bone Rush
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe is assaulted by a series of flurry strikes with a bone club. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Successive Actions.

name: Bonemerang
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon throws their bone against the foe, the bone spins in the air and makes a comeback to strike a second time. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Ranged. Double Action.

name: Boomburst
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon creates a sudden explosive sound that deafens everyone around. Area Move. Sound Move.

name: Bounce
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon jumps at least 30 feet in the air before landing with a mighty stomp on top of the foe. While in the air it is safe from most treaths but its still vulnerable to bad weather. Single Target. Charge Move. Out of Range while Charging. Vulnerable while charging to: Thunder / Twister / Sky Uppercut / Gust / Hurricane / Smack Down. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Paralyze the Target.

name: Bouncy Bubble
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user shoots bubbles at its target, the bubbles are filled up with fresh water and bounce back towards the user. Should you drink the water inside? Who cares? It’s fun! Single Target. The User restores HP equal to half the damage dealt, rounded down. If the User of this Move is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.

name: Branch Poke
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon rudely starts poking its foe with a stick. Single Target.

name: Brave Bird
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Back in the day humans relied on birds to send their messages and even go to war. Many earned medals for bravery. Single Target. Recoil.

name: Breaking Swipe
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon will make a long swipe at using its tail. All foes fall to the ground and come up pretty bruised. All Foes in Range. Reduce by 1 the Strength of those affected.

name: Breakneck Blitz
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Brick Break
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses a karate technique to chop through tall piles of bricks. No matter how many layers you pile up, they’ll break regardless. Single Target. *If there is a Force field on the Target's side of the field, destroy it and add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool.

name: Brine
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A splash of sea water that literally adds more and more salt to the foe’s wounds. Single Target. *Add 3 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool if the Target is at half HP or less.

name: Brutal Swing
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon starts attacking at full force with its claws, anyone unfortunate enough to be in its path will end up severely wounded. Target All foes in Range. Lethal.

name: Bubble
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Dozens of bubbles are sent floating through the battlefield. The foes can’t resist the temptation to burst the pretty bubbles, only for the bubbles to explode for real when they do. Target All Foes in Range. Roll 1 Chance Die to Reduce by 1 the Dexterity of those affected.

name: Bubble Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A powerful stream of foamy bubbles shot straight into the foe Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Reduce the Target's Dexterity by 1.

name: Bug Bite
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon nibbles at their foe in hopes of finding something tasty to snack on. Single Target. Bite Move. If the target Pokemon is holding a berry, the User eats it and gains its effects.

name: Bug Buzz
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses their wings or a part of their bodies to emit distracting buzzes all around. Target All Foes in Range. Sound Move. Roll 1 Chance Die to Reduce by 1 the Sp. Defense of those affected.

name: Bulk Up
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon showcase their muscles through poses that highlight their fitness and bodybuilding discipline. Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Strength and Defense.

name: Bulldoze
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user stomps and flattens the ground, pushing all the rubbish and leaving the surface ready for construction. Area Move. Reduce by 1 the Dexterity of those affected.

name: Bullet Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 You cannot outrun a bullet. Single Target. Reaction 1. Fist Move.

name: Bullet Seed
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon starts shooting seed as if they were a machine gun. Single Target. Ranged. Successive Actions. Projectile Moves.

name: Burn Up
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The User unleashes all of its might through a massive blast of raging fire. Although the damage is devastating the Pokémon is left unable to produce more fire for a while. Single Target. Lethal. After damage is dealt, the user loses its Fire-Type. If its only type was Fire, it is now Typeless. User's Physical & Special Fire-Type Moves have Power 0. Whole Scene Duration. This effect does not end by switching out the User.

name: Burning Bulwark
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon lights a fire coat around itself as a protective barrier. It is not a good idea to touch it. Target Self. Reaction 4. Shield Move. Reduce 3 Damage the User would receive from a Damaging Move. *If the Foe used a Non-Ranged Physical Move, inflicct 1st Degree Burn to it.

name: Burning Jealousy
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user can’t stand the idea that others are better than them. Their jealousy manifests in the form of a fiery aura that sticks to those the user despises de most. Target All Foes in Range. *Inflict 1st Degree Burn on all affected Targets with Increased Attributes.

name: Buzzy Buzz
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon releases a jolt of static electricity from its fur, that makes a cute zapping sound. It’s all fun and games until somebody gets paralyzed. Single Target. Paralyze the foe. If the user of this Move is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.

name: Calm Mind
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon takes a deep breath to increase the mental fortitude required to face any problem. Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Special and Sp. Defense.

name: Camouflage
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon blends with their surroundings to increase their chances of survival. Target Self. For the rest of the scene the User changes type to one that fits the terrain/ environment it is in (ie User is in a rocky cave, becoming rock type).

name: Captivate
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shows off their attractiveness and even flirts with the opponents, those who fall for their charms can’t keep focus on the battle. Target All Foes in Range. Reduce by 2 the Special of those affected.

name: Ceaseless Edge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user slashes the foe using a sharp but brittle shell. Tiny spikes from the shell are left embeded into the foe’s wounds causing more damage as the foe moves. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. High Critical. Cutter Move. Ongoing Damage with Duration of 4 Rounds.

name: Charge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user gathers electricity and stores it to make its attacks more powerful. You may also use them as a living battery for your phone. Target Self. Add 2 Dice to the Damage Pool of thenext Damaging Electric-Type Move the User performs.

name: Charge Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon releases an electric beam, if any charge remains unused, it will make use of it to boost its power. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Roll 5 Chance Dice to Increase User's Special by 1.

name: Charm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon engages their foe in a charming interaction to reduce their aggressive intent. Single Target. Reduce Target's Strength by 2.

name: Chatter
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon parrots the voice of a human and starts issuing silly commands to the foe. This quickly becomes confusing for the foe. Single Target. Sound Move. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Confuse the Target.

name: Chilling Water
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon douses cold water in the head of their foe in order to make them think straight. Surprisingly, it works. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Strength by 1.

name: Chilly Reception
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 “What did a Geodude say to another Geodude? Let’s Rock!” The User tells a joke so terrible the whole battlefield freezes. Afterwards, the user retreats in shame. Target Battlefield. Switcher Move For the User. Activate Snowy Weather. Duration 4 Rounds. Pokemon with this Move may forfeit their Cool score completely. If the Pokemon forgets this Move, restore 1 Point to their Cool Score.

name: Chip Away
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Bit by bit the Pokémon finds an opening though all layers of defense their target has until there is nothing left to protect it from a direct strike. Single Target. Ignore Cover & Substitute decoys. Ignore Defenses. Remove effects that increase Evasion Actions from the Target (ie Moves like: Double Team, Minimize. Abilities like: Sand Veil)

name: Chloroblast
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon concentrates all of the chlorophyll inside of their body to make it explode. Targets are tinted green for days afterwards. Single Target. Recoil.

name: Circle Throw
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Using their best sumo moves, the Pokémon throws the foe 60ft. out of the battlefield. Single Target. Low Accuracy -1. Late Reaction 1. Switcher Move for the foe.

name: Clamp
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Lured by a beautiful pearl, the target is clamped by the user’s sturdy shell. The user will not release the target until they no longer feel movement. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Block both User and Target. Ongoing Damage. Increase the Target's difficulty to Evade at Storyteller's discretion. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Clanging Scales
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon rattles the scales of its armor creating a frightening noise in the area. Some of its scales fall off as a result, leaving some areas exposed. Target all Foes in Range. Sound Move. Reduce User's Defense by 1.

name: Clangorous Soul
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shakes its scales around, to sharpen, shed, and rearrange them. It’s a bit rough, but in the end the Pokémon feels more focused for battle. Target Self. User deals Damage Dice to itself equal to Half of its Total HP rounded down. Increase by 1 the User's Strength, Dexterity, Special, Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Clash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A power struggle can become a clash of mights, usually with explosive results. Target Self. Reaction 6. Match the number of successes on the Accuracy roll of a Move that targets the User. If successful, the user Clashes, see p.68. This Maneuver is not affected by the Multiple Action difficulty chart.

name: Clear Smog
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user shoots a blast of venomous pins that inject venom into the foe, this venom is specially potent against those already compromised. Single Target. Never Miss. Reset all Increased or Reduced Attributes on the Foe.

name: Close Combat
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon gets close enough to deal devastating damage, but the same can be said for the foe. Single Target. Reduce by 1 the User's Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Coaching
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 This Pokémon allies form a line and start doing squats and push-ups while the user corrects their form and gives them tips and a confidence boost to win this match. Target All Allies in Range. Increase by 1 the Strength and Defense of all Allies targeted. The User cannot target itself.

name: Coil
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon curls up into themselves. Foes soon realize this is not the position of a prey in hiding, but of a hunter about to spit their venom. Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Strength and Defense score and Accuracy Pools.

name: Collision Course
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Koraidon dashes through the field with a screeching sound, it will not stop until it violently crashes. Causing a massive prehistoric explosion. Single Target. Lethal. Unique. *Add 4 Extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move if the Target is weak to Fight-Type Moves.

name: Combat Torque
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 After shaking and beating their target up, the user will attempt to immovilize them. Single Target. Lethal. Ranged. Roll 3 Chance dice to Paralyze the Target.

name: Comet Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A series of rapid punches. So fast they leace a luminous trail behind like a comet’s. Single Target. Fist Move. Successive Actions.

name: Comeuppance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 An eye for en eye, the user retaliates with a vengance against those who cross them. Single Target. Can only be used if Target's last Move on User was a Physical or Special Move. Roll dice equal to Target's last damage pool rolled against the User plus 2 dice.

name: Confide
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon tells a secret to the target. They giggle together but the foe loses its concentration on the battle. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Special by 1.

name: Confuse Ray
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user flashes a sinister ray of bright light that others cannot help but go straight into it. Single Target. Confuse the Target.

name: Confusion
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A basic mental assault that makes the foe believe they are being attacked by an invisible enemy. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Confuse the Target.

name: Constrict
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon tightens their hold on the foe to keep them locked in a squeeze. Single Target. This Move deals Typeless damage. Roll 1 chance die to reduce the Target's Dexterity by 1.

name: Continental Crush
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Remove Terrain, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Contrict
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. This Move deals Typeless Damage. Roll 1 Chance Die to Reduce the Target's Dexterity by 1.

name: Conversion
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon downloads data from their database to add into their own code. Target Self. Unique. Change the User's Main Type at random. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Conversion 2
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon downloads data from a Move that was used against it and changes their code to resist future attacks. Target Self. Unique. After being dealt damage by a Physical or Special Move, change the User's Main Type to a Type resistant to that Move. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Copycat
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user is incredibly observant and has a talent for impersonations, no one will tell the difference! Single Target. Copy Move. Unique Moves can't be copied. You may choose another Target(s) for the copied Move.

name: Core Enforcer
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Zygarde shoots a beam that fractures the target to its core, rendering it unable to sustain even their own essence. Single Target. If the User has already received Damage from the Target this Round, Remove the Target's Ability for the rest of the scene. This effect does not end by switching out the affected Pokemon. Unique Abilities are not affected by this effect.

name: Corkscrew Crash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Ignore Ability, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Corrosive Gas
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon releases a powerful acidic gas that melts all inorganic matter in seconds. Area Attack. Those affected lose their held item.

name: Cosmic Power
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon elevates their cosmos to enhance their physical and mental fortitude. Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Cotton Guard
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon grows a lush coat of cotton puffs. The cotton greatly reduces all kinds of impact. Target Self. Increase the User's Defense by 3.

name: Cotton Spore
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe is covered head to toe in cotton fluff, disrupting its movement. Single Target. Powder Move. Reduce the Target's Dexterity by 2.

name: Counter
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon strikes back at their foe. Showing they can take a hit and punch even harder. Single Target. Late Reaction 5. Can only be used if Target's last Move on User was a Physical Move. For damage, roll dice equal to Target's last damage pool rolled against the User plus 2 dice. Ignore Defenses.

name: Court Change
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon signals the referee for half-time, the referee complies and both parties swap their sides of the field. Wait... we brought everything with us, right? Target Battlefield. Swap any Force Fields, Entry Hazards and Effects on the Foe's side of the field (ie Tailwind, Grassy Terrain healing, Fire Pledge.) for those on the User's side.

name: Cover An Ally
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Use your body as a shield to protect your friends! Not even 100 Spearrows will go through you! Target One Ally. Priority 1. The User will become the Target for incoming attacks towards the Target. This Cover lasts until the User's Next Turn or until the Target uses a Non-Ranged Physical Move. Pokémon with Loyalty 2 or less won't use this Maneuver.

name: Covet
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon is attracted to shiny and colorful items. They don’t understand when something is not theirs for the taking so they just take it when no one is looking. Single Target. The User steals the Target's Held Item. If the User already has a Held Item, this effect fails.

name: Crabhammer
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses their powerful claws to beat down any foe. There’s a reason seafood is not too popular in this world. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. High Critical

name: Crafty Shield
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon creates a magic shield to protect everyone from any tricks a foe has up their sleeve. Under this shield, everyone can see dishonesty and bad intentions Target User and Allies in Range. Reaction 3. Shield Move. Negate the Added Effects from Moves made against the Targets.

name: Cross Chop
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon delivers a chop with crossed arms, a quite impractical but extremely cool technique. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. High Critical.

name: Cross Poison
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon releases a powerful acidic gas that melts all inorganic matter in seconds. Single Target. Cutter Move. High Critical. Roll 1 Chance Die to Poison the Target.

name: Crunch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon viciously mauls, tears, and rips apart anything its fangs can come in contact with. Single Target. Bite Move. Lethal. Roll 1 Chance Die to Reduce the foe's Defense by 1.

name: Crush Claw
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With a crushing grip against the foe, the user manages to break their armor. Single Target. Roll 5 Chance Dice to Reduce the Target's Defense by 2.

name: Crush Grip
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon grips the foe and starts crushing it. Small targets are difficult to grasp but larger bodies will not be released until they break. Single Target. Lethal. Unique. *If the foe has an HP higher than 4, add 1 Extra Die to the Damage pool for every exceeding point. Up to 9 Dice may be added this way.

name: Curse
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user mutters an evil incantation, misery will befall into the foe at the cost of the user’s soul. To get rid of the curse, perform an exorcism or get help at a Pokémon Center Single Target. Roll half of the User's HP as Typeless Damage Dice to itself, ignoring defenses. The Target will remove 1 success from all of their Rolls until the Curse if lifted.

name: Curse (Non-Ghost)
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Strength and Defense. Reduce by 1 the User's Dexterity. This effect only works if the User is not Ghost-Type.

name: Cut
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A swift and precise cut that can even slice a tree in half. Single Target. Lethal. Cutter Move. Out of battle it will help to easily cut down trees and obstacles.

name: Dark Pulse
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A haze of dark energy decends on the battlefield preying on those vulnerable to the obscure feelings and fears it provokes. Target Random Foe. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target.

name: Dark Void
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A portal opens and transports all foes to a world of darkness, inside they can’t see or feel anything, it’s like they are trapped in an eternal slumber. Target all foes in Range. Low Accuracy 3. Put those affected to Sleep.

name: Darkest Lariat
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user swings both of its arms against the target, there’s no armor thick enough to stop this cruel strike. Single Target. Ignore Defenses.

name: Dazzling Gleam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shines bright like a diamond. The powerful flash hurts the eyes of everyone watching. Target All foes in Range.

name: Decorate
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With just a bit of cake frosting the Pokémon decorates their target to look bigger, more powerful and incredibly delicious! Target One Ally. Increase by 2 the Strength and Special of the Target.

name: Defend Order
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A swarm of bugs flies around the user, creating a barrier to protect their swarm queen from damage. Target Self. Increase the User's Defense and Sp. Defense by 1.

name: Defense Curl
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user curls into a ball to protect themselves when they feel threatened. Target Self. Increase the User's Defense by 1. Increase by 1 the Power of the Moves "Ice Ball" & "Rollout".

name: Defog
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A strong wind sweeps out the battle field, removing anything from bad weather to scattered objects and even invisible barriers. Target Battlefield. Remove all Force Fields, Entry Hazards and Terrains (Misty Terrain, Electric Terrain, etc.) from the Battlefield.

name: Destiny Bond
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through a mystical bond, everyone who brings disgrace to this Pokémon will suffer the exact same fate. Target Self. If the user faints this Round due to damage frm a Physical or Special Move, the Pokemon who dealt the damage is dealt damage equal to their remaining Hp. This Move will fail if it was used the previous Round.

name: Detect
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon detects the intentions of the attacker and reacts just in time to minimize the damage. Target Self. Reaction 5. Shield Move. Reduce 3 Damage this Pokemon would receive from a Physical or Special move. Negate the Added Effcts of Any Moves that target the user.

name: Devastating Drake
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Sound Move, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Diamond Storm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon summons a storm of diamonds over the field. These diamonds also serve as barriers the user can take cover into. All foes in range. Ranged. Roll 5 chance dice to increase the user's defense by 2.

name: Dig
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user digs a tunnel on the ground and attacks by coming out from below its target. This move has been used to escape caves and gain access to highly surveiled places. Single Target. Charge Move. Out of Range while Charging. Vulnerable while charging to: Earth Power/ Earthquake/ Fissure/ Magnitude/ Stomping Tantrum. Out of battle allows the Pokemon to burrow and make underground tunnels.

name: Dire Claw
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon makes a cut on their victim with claws drenched in venom; then patiently stalks it, waiting for the toxins to wear it out. Single Target. High Critical. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Poison the Target. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Paralyze the Target. Roll 2 Chance Dice to put the Target to Sleep.

name: Disable
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon finds the right nerve to pull that will render a foe useless to perform their best Move. Single Target. Disable the last Move performed by the Target. Only one Move may be Disabled at a time.

name: Disarming Voice
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With a charming but manipulative cry, the user deals emotional damage to their opponent by making them feel guilty. Target All Foes in Range. Sound Move. Never Miss.

name: Discharge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user lets out an enormous discharge over the arena. Lightning does not distinguish friend from foe. Area Move. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Paralyze those affected.

name: Dive
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Just look at the world around you right here on the ocean floor, such wonderful things surround you. What more are you lookin’ for? Single Target. Charge Move. Out of Range while Charging. Vulnerable while charging to: Scald/ Surf/ Whirlpool/ Freeze-Dry/ Sheer Cold. Out of battle allows the Pokemon to move underwater carrying someone without risk of drowning.

name: Dizzy Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon locates their enemy’s balance point and lands a swift punch that leaves the foe seeing a swirl of stars around its head. Single Target. Fist Move. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Confuse the Target.

name: Doodle
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 By doodling a quick drawing of their target the doodle somehow allows the Pokémon to make use of the depicted creature’s powers. Single Target. Replace the User's Ability with the Target's. Whole Scene Duration. Unique Abilities can't be copied.

name: Doom Desire
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Be careful what you wish for, this Pokémon will read your most intimate wishes and make them come true in very twisted ways. Single Target. Unique. This Move's damage is dealt at the beginning of the next Rund. Ignore Shield Moves, Force Field, Cover & Substitute decoys. If the target retires or switches out from battle, the damage will be dealt to the next opponent or to one of its allies. Extra effects may be added at Storyteller's Discretion.

name: Double Hit
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses the true and tested “one-two”. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Double Action.

name: Double Iron Bash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user hardens its limbs and then rotates them at great speed to hit the foe twice in a row. The blow can leave the victim crushed on the floor. Single Target. Fist Move. Unique. Double Action. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Foe after each hit. This Move may only Flinch once.

name: Double Kick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The good old one-two but with a twist. Single Target. Double Action.

name: Double Shock
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user lets out a colossal discharge of electricity, lightning connecting the sky and earth for way too long. However, the effort effectively depletes the energy reserves of the user. Single Target. Lethal. After damage is dealt, the user loses its Electric-Type. If its only type was Electric, it is now Typeless. User's Physical & Special Electric-Type Moves have Power 0. Whole Scene Duration. This effect does not end by switching out the User.

name: Double Slap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The name is misleading as the user slaps withouth even counting how many slaps they have given already Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Double Action.

name: Double Team
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon moves so fast they create a series of shadow copies of themselves. Trying to guess which one is the real one is a pain. Target Self. The User can now make up to 5 Evasions per Round.

name: Double-Edge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Without regard for their own safety, the Pokémon does a reckless attack against their foe. Single Target. Recoil.

name: Draco Meteor
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon summons a meteor to fall from the sky directly into their foes, dealing a brutal amount of damage. An impressive display if power that demands a lot of energy. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. lethal. Reduce User's Special by 2.

name: Dragon Ascent
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user rises above the clouds and then comes crashing down against its foe in an instant. The strike is brutal for the both of them. Single Target. Lethal. Unique. Reduce by 1 the User's Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Dragon Breath
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A mystical flame breath that feels strengely cold to the touch. It doesn’t burn in a conventional way. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Paralyze the Target.

name: Dragon Cheer
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With a mighty roar, the Pokémon fires up the battle spirit of their companions on their quest for victory. Target Allies in Range. All Physical and Special Moves of the Allies now have the "High Critical" Added Effect. *If an Ally is a Dragon-Type, Increase their Strength and Special by 1.

name: Dragon Claw
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses its strong claws to deliver a fierce tearing blow. Single Target.

name: Dragon Dance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user performs a vigorous and mystical dance to boost their fighting spirit and reflexes. Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Strength and Dexterity.

name: Dragon Darts
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon’s head is a nest for its less evolved forms, the younglings will sometimes be used as projectiles. Single Target. Ranged. Double Action.

name: Dragon Energy
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon converts its life-energy into a life-ending beam. No exaggeration. Target All foes in Range. Lethal. *Reduce 1 Dice from the Damage Pool for every missing HP the User has. Up to 5 dice may be removed this way.

name: Dragon Hammer
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon swings its body as a hammer and leaves the foe nailed to the cracked ground. Single Target.

name: Dragon Pulse
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sends out a powerful wave of energy through their mouth. Single Target.

name: Dragon Rage
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon focuses their inner rage and makes it not-soinner anymore. Single Target. Set Damage. Deal 2 Dragon-Type Damage to the Target.

name: Dragon Rush
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon rushes to charge against their foe. Unlucky victims end up crushed into the ground. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target.

name: Dragon Tail
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sends their opponent flying up to 100ft in the air with a strong flick of their tail. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Late Reaction 6. Switcher Move for the Foe. In the wild, the battle may end.

name: Drain Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A solid punch that weakens the foes and revitalizes the user with each hit. Single Target. Fist Move. The User restores HP equal to half the damage dealt, rounded down.

name: Draining Kiss
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon blows a flirtatious kiss; the foe catches it believing to have found love, but it turns out to be a trick to steal its life energy. Single Target. The User restores HP equal to half the damage dealt, rounded down.

name: Dream Eater
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon enters the dream world for a snack. The dreams of children and baby Pokémon are the tastiest. Single Target. Can only be used if the Target has the Sleep Condition, otherwise it will fail. The User restores HP equal to half the damage dealt, rounded down.

name: Drill Peck
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A bird has no fangs, yet they can still can tear flesh. Single Target. Lethal.

name: Drill Run
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon holds their claws together and starts spinning as if they were a drill. They can puncture a hole into any surface from walls and floors to their foes. Single Target. Lethal. High Critical.

name: Drum Beating
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon has a perfectly good drum and you’d think it would use it. But it doesn’t, It uses it’s foe. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Dexterity by 1.

name: Dual Chop
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Two brutal blows are all this Pokémon needs to make the opponent yield to their might. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Double Action.

name: Dual Wingbeat
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon slams the foe from above. Each wing provides a good smacking. Single Target. Low Accuarcy 1. Double action.

name: Dynamax Cannon
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots a heavy projectile, if the foe is under the effects of the Dynamax phenomenon all the energy will be concentrated and explode on the Target. Single Target. *If the Target is under the effects of Dynamax, this Move becomes Lethal and you add 4 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool.

name: Dynamic Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A punch to a vital pressure point on the foe to disrupt their sense of balance Single Target. Low Accuracy 3. Fist Move. Confuse the Target.

name: Earth Power
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user sends out a subterranean wave that bursts the ground below the target. It’s as if the earth bends to the user’s will. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Reduce the Target's Sp. Defense by 1.

name: Earthquake
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user calls the forces of nature. The earth shakes violently and everything crumbles to the ground. Area Move. Ranged. If the Target is out of range due to using the Move "Dig" this Move hits anyways.

name: Echoed Voice
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon yells at the void. Their echo answers. The Pokémon yells louder and louder everytime the echo talks back. Single Target. Sound Move. This Move can be used many times in the same Round. *Add 1 Extra Die to the Damage pool of this move for each time you use it. Up to 8 Dice might be added this way. Reset this effect if the user performs another move, evasion or clash.

name: Eerie Impulse
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user radiates electricity around itself so the foe will think twice about attacking. Single Target. Reduce foe's Special by 2.

name: Eerie Spell
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon mutters ancient spell, forbidden words break the spirit to make the victim easier to manipulate. Single Target. Sound Move. Target spends 3 Will points without any benefit, this effect does not stack.

name: Egg Bomb
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The target can’t take a yolk. Let’s make them laugh with an egg-cellent pun to crack them up. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Ranged. Projectile Move.

name: Electric Terrain
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user electrifies the battlefield, making it impossible to relax around the sparks and live current. Target Battlefield. Add 1 Extra Damage Dice to all Physical & Special Electric-Type Moves. Pokemon without immunity to Ground will be cured of the Sleep Status. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Electrify
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user hurls a sudden electric jolt onto its target. The target’s is now charged and will need to release the excess energy through an attack. Single Target. Reaction 1. All Damage of the Next Physical or Special Move the Target performs will become Electric-Type

name: Electro Ball
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 An orb of electricity is hurled against the target, the faster the user dashes, the more momentum the orb gets. Single Target. Projectile Move. *Add 1 Extra Die to the Damage Pool of the user for every Point on Dexterity it has that surpasses the Foe's. Up to 4 Dice might be added this way.

name: Electro Drift
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Miraidon accelerates its turbines and races forward at ultrafast speeds, piercing its target in a blast of futuristic electricity Single Target. Lethal. Unique. *Add 4 Extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move if the Target is weak to Electric-Type Moves.

name: Electro Shot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user stands as tall as possible, waiting for a lightning to strike. Then re-directs the lightning directly towards the foe; recharging themselves in the process. Single Target. Lethal. Charge Move. If Rain Weather is active, you skip this Move's Charge acton. Increase the User's Special Score by 1.

name: Electroweb
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 An electrified web is shot towards the target, shoking and tangling them at the same time. Target All foes in Range. Reduce by 1 the Dexterity of those affected.

name: Embargo
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user demands the held item of a Pokémon and the items in the bag of their trainer. Scared, both Pokémon and Trainer comply Single Target. The Target loses its Held Item. Target's Trainer & Partners can't use Items on the Target. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Ember
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A basic fire attack, but not any less dangerous. Even a small flame can grow out of control. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to inflict 1st Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Encore
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon makes a standing ovation at their target, prompting them to repeat everything they just did, exactly the way they did it. Single Target. Reaction 3. The Target will repeat the exact same action sequence it had last Round. Target must have had an action sequence. Duration 1 Round. If used on the previous Round, this move fails. See more on p. 529.

name: Endeavor
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through sheer willpower the Pokémon manages to level the conditions of the battle despite their own injuries. Single Target. Roll Dice of Normal-Type Damage equal to the difference between the User's current HP and the Target's max HP. Ignore defenses. Up to 10 Dice may be rolled this way. This Damage cannot make the Target's HP go lower than the User's current HP.

name: Endure
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon mentally prepares to receive a fatal blow, their spirit is stronger than their body so they endure to keep on fighting for as long as possible. Target Self. Reaction 5. Shield Move. If a Physical or Special Move would cause the user to faint, they remain at 1 HP instead, remove this effect afterwards. The effect re-activates on the user's next Turn. Whole Round duration.

name: Energy Ball
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Gathering nature’s energy from nearby plants, trees and roots, the Pokémon forms a ball to shoot at the enemy. Sadly, the surrounding plants will be dry afterwards. Single Target. Projectile Move. Roll 1 Chance Die to Reduce the Target's Sp. Defense by 1.

name: Entrainment
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon trains and teaches their best ability to their target. The target becomes a master of this ability in a record time. Single Target. Replace the Target's Ability with the User's. Unique Abilities can't be passed or replaced. Whole Scene Duration. This effect does not end by switching out the affected Pokemon.

name: Eruption
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A fierce burst of lava comes out from the Pokémon at full force, charring whatever comes in contact with it. The lava flow diminishes as the rage subsides. Target All Foes in Range. Lethal. *Reduce 1 Dice from the Damage Pool for every missing HP the User has. Up to 5 dice may be removed this way.

name: Esper Wing
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The User slashes the foe with psychic energy channeled through their wings. This energy also allows it to cut through the air and fly faster. Single Target. High Critical. Increase the User's Dexterity by 1.

name: Eternabeam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots an incredibly powerful beam towards the sky. The energy released might keep traveling through space thousands of years later. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Lethal. Must Recharge.

name: Evasion
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 No time to think! If you hear "Dooooooodge!" You get out of the way A.S.A.P Target Self. Reaction 6. Match the number of successes on the Accuracy roll of a Move that targets the User. If successful, the user Evades, see p.68. This Maneuver is not affected by the Multiple Action difficulty chart.

name: Expanding Force
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Psychic energies form a bubble of light to damage the foe. Under Psychic Terrain, the energy is so big it turns into a tall pillar that crushes anyone inside. Single Target. Lethal. *If Psychic Terrain is active, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move and you may add another target to it.

name: Explosion
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through a massive explosion the Pokémon destroys all they can before fainting. Sometimes the only way to get out of a bad situation is in bits and pieces. Area Move. Ranged. Lethal. The User Faints.

name: Extrasensory
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon alters their target’s senses, making it feel things that aren’t really there. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Flinch the Target.

name: Extreme Speed
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Gotta go extremely fast. Single Target. Reaction 2. Out of battle, triple the Pokemon's movement speed.

name: Facade
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon puts on a brave face through the most difficult of situations. Single Target. *If the User has a Status Ailment (Paralysis, Poison, Burn, etc.) Add 3 Extra Dice to the Damage pool.

name: Fairy Lock
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The User moves as if locking a door, preventing anyone from leaving the room. It takes everyone a few seconds to realize they are not really trapped. Target Battlefield. Block. Duration 1 Round.

name: Fairy Wind
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon let’s out sweet a breeze of glittery fairy dust. It gives a mild rash to those without happy thoughts. Single Target. Wind Move.

name: Fake Out
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon pretends to be getting ready for the battle when they are actually prepairing a surprise attack on the foe. Single Target. Reaction 1. Flinch the Target. This Move will only work on the First Round the User is out in battle. from the Second Round on, it will fail automatically.

name: Fake Tears
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user stops mid-combat to start crying; feeling incredibly guilty, the foe lowers its guard. Single Target. Reduce foe's Sp. Defense by 2.

name: False Surrender
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon bows down in defeat, begging for forgiveness; then backstabs the guillible foe. Single Target. Never Miss.

name: False Swipe
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through their most dramatic poses, the Pokémon pretends to slice up the foe (the blood is fake). Single Target. Cutter Move. This Move's Damage can't make the Target go below 1 HP.

name: Feather Dance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A dance as soft as a feather. It soothes the hearts of the spectators and reduces all aggression. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Strength by 2.

name: Feint
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user begins their attack, and as their target attempts to protect itself, the user feints the target to break their defense against their true strike. Single Target. Late Reaction 1. This Move ignores the effects of any Shield Move active on the Target and removes their effects for the rest of the Round.

name: Feint Attack
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user approaches inconspicuously, pretending to attack the foe directly, then actually hits the foe from behind. Single Target. Never Miss.

name: Fell Stinger
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon stings the target, if the foe is too weakened to move, the user absorbs their power. Single Target. *If used against a fainted Target ot if the Target faints due to damage from this Move, Increase the User’s Strength by 2.

name: Fickle Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon is formed by many individual heads who rarely agree with one another, but when they do their combined power is devastating. Single Target Before you roll damage, Roll 1 die to determine this Move's Power.

name: Fiery Dance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon cloaks themselves in flames while dancing with graceful passion. The flames are scattered and the user feels reinvigorated. Single Target. Roll 5 Chance Dice to Increase User's Special by 1.

name: Fiery Wrath
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon’s wrath is turned to flames that consume the foe’s body and soul. Target all Foes in Range. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Flinch those affected.

name: Fillet Away
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon slices pieces of itself to sharpen out the edges and give themselves a more hydrodynamic shape. Target Self. Deal 2 Damage to the User. Increase the User's Strength, Dexterity and Special by 2.

name: Final Gambit
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon puts its last Strength into an all-or-nothing attack. After that, the user faints. Single Target. Ignore Defenses. The user Faints after dealing Damage.

name: Fire Blast
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots a giant fireball that explodes as soon as it touches their target. Blasting fire in all directions. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Lethal. Roll 3 Chance Dice to inflict 3rd Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Fire Fang
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon bites the foe with their mouth ablaze, tearing and searing their foe’s flesh in a single attack. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Bite Move. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target. Roll 2 Chance Dice to inflict 1st Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Fire Lash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With a whip of fire, the Pokémon ensnares its foe, who is left defenseless and at its mercy Single Target. Reduce Foe's Defense by 1.

name: Fire Pledge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon chants to invoke the power of fire, their pledge is heard and the flames come forward to aid them in battle. Area Move. This Effect Targets the Battle Field: At the End of the Round, Roll 2 Dice of Fire-Type Damage to everyone without immunity to Ground on the field ignoring defenses. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Fire Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A fist powered by the fiery spirit of combat, the heat of the battle lights of for real as the punch hits the foe right where it hurts! Single Target. Fist Move. Roll 1 Chance Die to inflict 2nd Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Fire Spin
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user creates a vortex of fire that remains spinning in the battlefield, trapping the foe within. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Blocks. Ongoing Damage. Duration 4 Rounds. Increase the Target's difficulty to Evade at Storyteller's discretion.

name: First Impression
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon makes a dramatic entrance to the battlefield, taking the foe by surprise. Single Target. Reaction 2. This Move will only work on the First Round the User is out in battle. From the second round on, it will fail automatically.

name: Fishious Rend
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 This Pokémon uses their gills to snap at its target. Even if they don’t have teeth, their jaws have a crushing strength. Single Target. Bite Move. *If this is the first Action of the Round for the User, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move.

name: Fissure
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The earth rips apart underneath the target and swallows them whole. You’ll need a rescue team to recover the unlucky victim from the deep. Single Target. Low Accuracy 5. Ranged. Deal Damage to the Target equal to its Remaining HP, plus 1 Lethal Damge. If the Target is out of range due to using the Move "Dig" this Move hits anyways.

name: Flail
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user flails around trying to stay alive, as they get closer to fainting, more adrenaline will fuel their efforts of survival. Single Target. *Add 1 Extra Die to the Damage Pool of this Move for every missing Point of HP the user has. Up to 5 Dice may be added this way.

name: Flame Burst
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A compact fireball that bursts just as it hits the foe, scattering smaller flames to unsuspecting bystanders. Single Target. After dealing damage, the User may roll 1 die of Fire-Type Damage against two other targets, ignoring defenses.

name: Flame Charge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon dashes so fast they leave a trail of fire behind. Single Target. Increase the User's Dexterity by 1.

name: Flame Wheel
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user surrounds themselves with fire, then curl into a ball and runs over the target in a fiery spin. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to inflict 1st Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Flamethrower
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The most emblematic fire attack, a seeminly endless stream of fire that reduces everything and everyone to ashes. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to inflict 2nd Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Flare Blitz
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A reckless blazing charge against their foe, ends up with an explosive collision Single Target. Recoil. Roll 1 Chance die to inflict 3rd Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Flash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon glows with a bright light to temporarily blind and dazzle their foe. It’s also perfect to light up dark places. Single Target. Reduce 1 success to all the Accuracy Rolls of the Target.

name: Flash Cannon
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through shiny metal parts of their body, the Pokémon reflects a light beam straight into the foe’s eyes. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Reduce the Target's Sp. Defense by 1.

name: Flatter
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user starts flattering and admiring its opponent. It sure makes them feel good about themselves but...why?! Single Target. Increase the Target's Special by 1. Confuse the Target.

name: Fleur Cannon
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A light beam pierces the battlefield, it deals devastating damage but leaves newly grown flowers instead of scorched earth. The user is left feeling very tired. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Lethal. Unique. Reduce User's Special by 2.

name: Fling
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon takes their held item, uses it as a weapon and the referee is somehow OK with this. The held item remains in the field and may be recovered after the battle. Single Target. Ranged. *If the User is holding an Item, Add up to 4 dice to the damage pool. User loses its Held Item. See p. 530

name: Flip Turn
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Charge at the foe as a cannon ball made out of water. The big splash causes bystanders to lose sight on the battlefield. When the splash settles, the user is gone. Single Target. Switcher Move for the User.

name: Floaty Fall
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With the help of 99 air balloons, the user jumps up high and falls on top of its foe. The use of 99 balloons in-battle is questionable, but the referee will allow them. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target. If the user of this Movve is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.

name: Floral Healing
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user creates a flower crown that heals and relaxes its wearer. Under the right conditions this move also creates a flower patch around its target. Target One Ally. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate. If Performed over Grassy Terrain this move is a Complete Heal.

name: Flower Shield
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The whole field grows flowers and those flowers keep growing on top of all Grass-Type Pokémon in the field, providing a mild cover and protection from harm. Target battlefield. Increase by 1 the Defense of all Grass-Type Pokemon.

name: Flower Trick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user throws a bouquet of flowers at the target, who holds them close believing them to be a gift, only to realize the bouquet were flower bombs. Single Target. Never Miss. This Move is always considered to be a Critical Hit and gets the proper Bonus for it.

name: Fly
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses an action to fly up high, to asses the best angle to take a dive against the foe. Pokémon who know this Move can fly for long periods of time without rest. Single Target. Charge Move. Out of Range while Charging. Vulnerable while charging to: Thunder / Twister / Sky Uppercut / Gust / Hurricane / Smack Down. Out of battle allows the Pokemon to fly long distances.

name: Flying Press
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user jumps up the ropes to hit the foe using their knees in pure Lucha Libre style! Single Target. This move deals damage as if it was also Flying-Type.

name: Focus Blast
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A powerful energy blast that requires the user to chant each syllabe of the technique’s name and release it by yelling “Haaaaa!” Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Projectile Move. Roll 1 Chance die to Reduce the foe's Sp. Defense by 1.

name: Focus Energy
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon concentrates all their focus on the battle to make their attacks much more precise. Target Self. All of the user's Physical & Special Moves now have "High Critical". Whole Scene Duration.

name: Focus Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user must focus on delivering the greatest punch in history, if they succeed they’ll be known as the One-Punch Pokémon. Single Target. Fist Move. Charge Move. The User Flinches if it is hit while Charging this Move.

name: Follow Me
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokemon draws everyone’s attention, provoking their foes to do their worse. Target Self. Reaction 5. All Foe's Moves able to do so will Target the user. Duration 1 Round.

name: Force Palm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A powerful open-palm hit that knocks the foe several feet away and may leave them unable to move. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Paralyze the Target.

name: Foresight
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses their honed senses and mental agility to predict the next movement of their foe. Single Target. The Foe cannot Evade Moves performed by the User. User ignores Ghost-Type immunity to Normal and Fight-Type Moves and vice versa.

name: Forest's Curse
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user lays the forest’scurse upon the target, causing roots and branches to grow on its body until they are a haunted tree. Perform an exorcism or get to a Pokémon Center ASAP Single Target. Add the Grass Type to the Target's Type. (ie Pikachu will now be "Electric/Grass", Charizard will not be "Fire/Flying/Grass") If the Target already has a third Type attached, replace it.

name: Foul Play
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user feints an attack that tricks the foe into hurting itself. Single Target. S.T.A.B. of the User and the Strength/Special of the foe are used for this Move's Damage Pool.

name: Freeze Dry
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 All moisture is frozen and then subjected to high pressure, evaporating it immediately. Water-type Pokémon suffer this Move the most. Single Target. Water-Type Pokemon receive Super-Effective Damage from this Move. If a Target is out of range due to using the Move "Dive" this Move hits anyways.

name: Freeze Shock
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user appears to become a block of ice, then releases itself from the ice with a devastating discharge. The exploding ice shards and the lightning fly all over the battlefield. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Charge Move. Ranged. Lethal. Unique. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Paralyze the Target.

name: Freezing Glare
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots freakin’ laser beams from its freakin’ eyes against everything that moves...until nothing does. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Freeze the Target.

name: Freezy Frost
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user touches its foe while saying “Freeze!”, surprisingly, the foe becomes frozen on a block of ice that melts as soon as the foe realizes it was just a game. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Remove all Increased or Reduced Attributes and Traits the Target may have. If the user of this Move is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.

name: Frenzy Plant
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user roots down and calls upon the force of nature. Thorny roots and plants grow in a frenzy around the foe. This display of power leaves the user quite exhausted. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Must Recharge.

name: Frost Breath
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user locates the most exposed parts of its foe and sends a gelid breath against it. The sudden chill goes right through the foe’s spine. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. This Move is always considered to be a Critical hit and gets the proper Bonus for it.

name: Frustration
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A mistreated Pokémon grows vicious and uncaring, a Move fueled by anger. Single Target. *Add 1 Extra Die to the Damage Pool of this Move for every missing point of Happiness on the user. Up to 5 Dice may be added this way.

name: Fury Attack
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon attacks in a fury, their attacks are uncoordinated but relentless. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Successive Actions.

name: Fury Cutter
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses their claws or scythes to rapidly cut as if shredding paper. Single Target. Successive Actions. Cutter Move.

name: Fury Swipes
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With their sharp claws, the Pokémon will swiftly scatch their foe, leaving its face full of small cuts. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Successive Actions.

name: Fusion Bolt
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon strikes with a devastating electric impact, said impact will grow larger and stronger if there’s a special kind of fire nearby. Single Target. Lethal. Unique. *If the Move "Fusion Flare" has already been used by anyone this Round, add 4 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move.

name: Fusion Flare
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sets ablaze a swirling pillar upon the target, said pillar will grow taller and swirl faster if there’s a special kind of charge nearby. Single Target. Lethal. Unique. *If the Move "Fusion Bolt" has already been used by anyone this Round, add 4 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move.

name: Future Sight
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon foresees something terrible happening. Although when it tries to see their own future, the images are ever changing. Single Target. This Move's damage is dealt at the beginning of the next Round. Ignore Shield Moves, Force Field, Cover & Substitute. If the target restires or switches out from battle, the damage will be dealt to the next opponent or to one of its allies.

name: Gastro Acid
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user spews their gastric juices on the foe. It’s so disgusting the foe can only concentrate on getting cleaned ASAP Single Target. Negate any effect the Target's Ability would have. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Gear Grind
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe gets trapped into two gears, the only way out is to let the gears grind against its crushed body. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Double Action.

name: Gear Up
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon performs a basic manteniance on their ally. A change of oil and filters, new spark plugs, and the ally is more than ready! Target One Ally. Increase by 1 the Strength and Spcial of one Steel-Type of Electric-Type Ally.

name: Geomancy
