description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through a mystical conection this Pokémon absorbs the life force of earth itself to increase its power. Target Self. Charge Move. Unique. Increase by 2 the User's Dexterity, Special and Sp. Defense.

name: Giga Drain
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon drains most of the foe’s vital energy and feeds on the nutrients it managed to extract. Single Target. The User restores HP equal to half the damage dealt, rounded down.

name: Giga Impact
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon strikes with such a brutal force they leave a crater just from the impact. Let them catch their breath afterwards. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Must Recharge. Lethal.

name: Gigaton Hammer
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 When you have a hammer everything is a nail. Single Target. Lethal. This Move will fail if it was used the previous Round. *This Move may deal 2 Extra Damage Dice to Steel-Type Pokemon at Storyteller's Discretion.

name: Gigavolt Havoc
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Paralyze, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Glacial Lance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 It looks just like any other Blizzard until the ice spears start raining straight into you. Target All Foes in Range. Lethal. Unique.

name: Glaciate
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The air is so cold it hurts to move, to see, to breath. Escaping should be your top priority, for every second you don’t your life will be at peril. Target All Foes in Range. Lethal. Unique. Reduce by 1 the Dexterity of those Affected. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Freeze those Affected.

name: Glaive Rush
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user attacks with its sharp dorsal fin by doing a somersault slash. This can pretty much slice in half anything, but it also leaves the user prone to sneak attacks. Single Target. Lethal. The User is now Vulnerable to: The Next Physical or Special Move that targets them.

name: Glare
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With just one look, the target knows it is about to be someone else’s lunch, fear has them immobilized. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Paralyze the Target.

name: Glitzy Glow
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user surrounds themselves with a glamorous light and shoots a psychic blast, the glowing particles remain in the field protecting their fabulousness. Single Target. After dealing damage, activate a Force Field against Special Damage with a Duration of 4 Rounds on the User's side of the Field. If the user of this Move is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.

name: Grapple
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Force the target into a wrestling lock; use a lasso rodeo-style; or simply cling onto one of their legs — the point is: you won’t let them escape! Single Target. Blocks. The Target may resist this Maneuver by rolling Strength or Dexterity and scoring the same or more Successes than the User. The User can't Act while Grappling. The User can release the Grapple at any point to act.

name: Grass Knot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user snares the foe’s feet with a grass tangle to make it fall into the ground. The bigger they are, the harder they fall. Single Target. *Add 1 Extra Damage Dice for every 50kg of weight on the foe, up to 4 Dice may be added this way.

name: Grass Pledge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon chants to invoke the power of grass, their pledge is heard and the ground crumbles as vegetation grapples and traps everyone in the field. Area Move. Reduce by 1 the Dexterity of those affected. This Effect Targets the Battle Field: Entry Hazard. Reduce by 1 the Dexterity of Target's that enter the battlefield. Pokemon with Immunity to Ground are not affected.

name: Grass Whistle
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A soothing and relaxing melody created with the sounds of nature. It is a very subtle tone, so it may be hard to listen. Single Target. Low Accuracy 3. Sound Move. Put the Target to Sleep.

name: Grassy Glide
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A single leaf can hold the entire weight of the Pokémon. When moving, it appears to glide over the grass. Single Target. *If Grassy Terrain is active, this Move has Reaction 1.

name: Grassy Terrain
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A patch of grass grows in the area surrounding the user, through it nature grants her many blessings. Target User's side of the field. Add 1 Extra Damage Dice to all Physical & Special Grass-Type Moves. Everyone on the User's side of the field heals 1 HP at the end of each Round. Spend 1 Will Point t activate. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Grav Apple
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon rises on top of its foe and drops an apple on their head. The foe proceeds to eat the apple, distracting it from the fight. Single Target. Ranged. Reduce the Target's Defense by 1.

name: Gravity
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 An invisisible force pulls everyone to the floor keeps them from taking off the ground. Target Battlefield. Remove the immunity to Ground-Type Moves for everyone in the field. Moves that require jumping or flying get an Extra "Low Accuracy 2". Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Growl
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Either through a menacing attitude or an adorable demeanor, the foe will hesitate to attack the user at full power. Target All Foes in Range. Sound Move. Reduce by 1 the Strength of those affected.

name: Growth
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon makes their body grow in size. They’ll get bigger and stronger in just a few seconds. Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Strength and Special. If the Sunny Weather is active, increase by 2 Instead.

name: Grudge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The last words of this Pokémon imprint their grudge and anger over their foe. Depleting the foe of their will to carry on in this world. Single Target. The User Faints. Reduce the Target's Will to 0 points and reset any effect it got from spending them. Roll Target's Loyalty at the end of the round, increase difficulty by 1 each round. Failing this roll faints the Target.

name: Guard Split
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through a mental link both Pokémon are aware of each other weaknesses, which end up evening the odds. Single Target. Average the User's Defense and Sp. Defense with the Target's, rounded down.

name: Guard Swap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon enters their foe’s mind to steal its fortitude and implant on them the idea of their own weakness. Single Target. Whole Scene Duration. Switch the User's Defense and Sp. Defense with the Target's.

name: Guillotine
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Fueled by the spirit of revolution the Pokémon sentences their foe to be reduced at the neck. This devastating attack requires an emergency trip to the Pokémon Center...and a basket. Single Target. Low Accuracy 5. Deal Damage equal to the Target's Remaining HP, plus 1 Lethal Damage.

name: Gunk Shot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The target is covered heat to toe in sludge, filth and organic waste. It can’t even cry for help or all of it will go into its mouth. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Ranged. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Poison the Target.

name: Gust
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon flaps their wings and strikes the foe with a swirl of wind. Pokémon in the air may get swept away Single Target. Wind Move. If the Target is Out of Range due to using "Fly", "Bounce" or "Sky Drop", this Move hits anyway.

name: Gyro Ball
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots a projectile. Correction: the Pokémon IS the projectile. Single Target. Projectile Move. *Add 1 Extra Die to the Damage Pool of this Move for every point on Dexterity the Target has that surpasses the User's. Up to 5 Dice may be added this way.

name: Hail
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The skies turn gray, and loud thunder rumbles, but what falls is not a gentle drizzle, but an endless stream of ice shards coming down at high speeds. Find shelter! Target Battlefield. Activate Hail Weather. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Hammer Arm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Stop. Hammer Arm time! Single Target. Fist Move. Low Accuracy 1. Reduce User's Dexterity by 1.

name: Hard Press
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe is grappled in a painful lock, the more it struggles to get out the more pressure it’s gonna feel. The user must be on top condition for this grapple to be effective. Single Target. *Reduce 1 Die from the Damage Pool for every missing Hp the User has. Up to 5 Dice may be removed this way.

name: Harden
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 When life gets hard, do the same. Target Self. Increase the User's Defense by 1.

name: Haze
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The battlefield is filled with a cleansing cloud that takes away all impurities in the field. It can also work as concealment. Target Battlefield. Remove all Increased or Reduced Attributes and Traits of everyone on the battlefield.

name: Head Charge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon is headstrong, in head-to-head competitions they will always charge head on. Single Target. Recoil.

name: Head Smash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Pokémon, angry. Pokémon, smash! Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Recoil.

name: Headbutt
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon rams against their foe with their head. This Move is perfect to shake down trees when looking for berries, but beware of wild Pokémon nesting at the treetops. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target. Out of battle it may cause a Random encounter when hitting trees and make objects drop from high places.

name: Headlong Rush
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 This Pokémon is headstrong in a very very literal way. Single Target. Reduce by 1 the User's Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Heal Bell
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The soothing chime of a magical bell cleanses all impurities. Target User and Allies in Range. Sound Move. Cure any Status Ailment on the Targets.

name: Heal Block
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through a massive mental onslaught, the Pokémon brings back the memories of pain on everyone around. Area Move. Those affected can't restore HP. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Heal Order
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The queen commands the swarm to bring her healing honey. Target Self. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate.

name: Heal Pulse
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Commanding the mind over the matter, the Pokémon speeds up the healing process on an ally. Target One Ally. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate.

name: Healing Wish
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 In a display of true selflessness, the user makes the ultimate sacrifice for the well-being of others. Target Self. The user faints. One allied Target restores its full HP and it is cured from any Status Condition. If the chosen Target is not in-battle, it is called out and ready to fight with the same remaining actions as the user.

name: Heart Stamp
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon controls the emotions of their victims just as they start to feel loved and safe, the Pokémon strikes. The poor victim is left broken hearted for a few seconds. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target.

name: Heart Swap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The User enters the mind of the foe to give implant them with their own feelings of insecurity and take the foe’s feelings of confidence in itself. Single Target. Switch the User's Trait and Attribute Increases and Reductions with those on the Target's.

name: Heat Crash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sets themselves ablaze and dives a cannonball against their foe. Single Target. *Add 1 Extra Die of Damage for every 50kgs the User is above the Target. Up to 4 Dice may be added this way.

name: Heat Wave
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A large wave of extra-hot air that can set fire to everything it touches. Target All Foes in Range. Low Accuracy 1. Wind Move. Roll 1 Chance Die to inflict 1st Degree Burn on those affected.

name: Heavy Slam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe is about to confirm if the Pokémon is thick-boned. Single Target. *Add 1 Extra Die to he Damage Pool for every 50kg of weight the User is above the target's weight. Up to 4 Dice may be added this way.

name: Help Another
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Not being the best suited for a task doesn’t mean you won’t do your part in helping out. The best teams work together! Target One Ally. Reaction 1. Roll your Accuracy as if it were Chance dice. Add 1 die to the Accuracy Roll of your Ally for each Success (result of 6) obtained this way. Up to 3 Characters may attempt to help a single Action. Up to 6 Dice may be added this way.

name: Helping Hand
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon is the first to come and give a hand to their friend. A true bro. Target One Ally. Reaction 5. The Target Gets 2 Extra Dice on their next Skill Check/Accuracy Roll, and 2 Extra Dice on their next Damage Roll. This Effect does not Stack.

name: Hex
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user casts a terrible hex over the target, the effects will be greater if the target is already burdened by an ailment. Single Target. *If the Target has an active Status Condition, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move.

name: Hidden Power
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Inside every Pokémon lies the key to unlock all kinds of power. Single Target. This Move will always deal Super-Effective Damage against the Target. If used by the Pokemon #201 Unown. See p. 530

name: High Horsepower
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon tramples their foe without mercy. Their powerful body could pull a traction vehicle for very long distances. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1.

name: High Jump Kick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user launches itself up three stories high to pummel down with a brutal kick. Let’s just trust it’s got a good aim from that distance. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. If the Accuracy roll fails, Roll 5 Dice of Typeless Damage against the user, ignoring defenses.

name: Hold Hands
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user offers their hand in friendship, if the other Pokémon holds their hand they’ll be very happy and become good friends. Single Target. The battle may end at the Storyteller's discretion. Target may resist rolling their Will Score against the Accuracy of this Move. Out of battle, aid to reduce hostile intent.

name: Hone Claws
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Sharp claws make for more precise and deadly attacks. Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Strength score and Accuracy Pools.

name: Horn Attack
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user has horns. Did you not expect they’ll use them? Single Target.

name: Horn Drill
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon stabs the target with a spinning horn, drilling through them until they are critical condition. Hurry to the nearest Pokémon Center. Single Target. Low Accuracy 5. Deal Damage equal to the Target's Remaining HP, plus 1 Lethal Damage.

name: Horn Leech
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user rams into the foe and uses the leaves growing on their horns to absorb nutrients from it. Single Target. The User restores HP equal to half the damage dealt, rounded down.

name: Howl
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 If you hear the howl, the pack has already surrounded you. Target User and Allies in Range. Sound Move. Increase by 1 the Strength of those affected.

name: Hurricane
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon calls upon fierce gale winds. It’ll be difficult to summon the tempest on a clear day, but a little rain will enhance it into a typhoon. Other pokémon in the air are in most danger. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Lethal. Wind Move. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Confuse the Target. Rain Weather eliminates Low Accuracy. Sunny Weather increases to Low Accuracy 4. If the Target is Out of Range due to using "Fly", "Bounce" or "Sky Drop", this Move hits anyways.

name: Hydro Cannon
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Those who fear fire’s destructive power have forgotten that water triumphs over the flames every single time. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Must Recharge

name: Hydro Pump
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Water works best under pressure. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2

name: Hydro Steam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 When water and fire work together you’ll wish they didn’t set aside their differences. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to inflict 1st Degree Burn on the Target. *If Sunny Weather is active, this Move does not reduce damage due to it, and has 2 Extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move.

name: Hydro Vortex
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Hyper Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A devastating beam, a path of destruction that can extend for miles is the unmistakable proof someone used this Move. Let the user rest before trying to use it again. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Must Recharge. Lethal.

name: Hyper Drill
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Using their tail as a powerful drill, the Pokémon pierces through any surface it comes in contact with. Single Target. Lethal. Ignore Shield Moves active on the Foe or their side of the field.

name: Hyper Fang
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon bites hard into the foe, leaving nasty teeth marks. Single Target. Bite Move. Roll 1 Chance die to Flinch the Target.

name: Hyper Voice
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user screeches or sings at such high frequencies that anything made of glass will break. The ears of the victims are left in no better state. Target All Foes in Range. Sound Move.

name: Hyperspace Fury
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon opens portals to attack with each one of its arms, bypassing all defenses and making it impossible to escape; however, portals go both ways. Single Target. Never Miss. Ignores the effect of any Force Field or Shield Move active on the foe's side. Reduce the User's Defense by 1.

name: Hyperspace Hole
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The laws of physics forbid one object from being in many places at once and from occupying the same space as other bodies. But the user disregards their autorithy. Single Target. Never Miss. Unique. Ignore Defenses. Ignore Shield Moves and Force Field.

name: Hypnosis
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 By staring at an hypnotic pendulum, the target is suggestioned to feel tired and close its eyelids. Single Target. Low Accuracy 3. Put the Target to sleep. Dark-Type Pokemon are affected by this Move.

name: Ice Ball
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon rolls into a snowball, getting bigger and bigger as they keep rolling Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Projectile Move. Successive Actions. *If all 5 actions land successfully, add 1 Extra Die to the Damage Pool of the last hit of this Move. If the Pokemon used the Move "Defense Curl" in the same round, this Move's base Power becomes 2.

name: Ice Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots a cold beam that reduces all warmth on the environment up to freezing point. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Freeze the Target.

name: Ice Burn
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user appears to become a block of ice, then it releases themselves from the ice with a devastating explosion. The exploding ice shards and fire blow all over the battlefield. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Lethal. Charge Move. Unique. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Inflict 1st Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Ice Fang
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon bites their foe with sharp teeth and a geli breath to chill their bones directly Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Bite Move. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Freeze the Target.

name: Ice Hammer
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses its powerful gelid arms and strikes the foe with a swing motion. Single Target. Fist Move. Low Accuracy 1. Reduce User's Dexterity by 1.

name: Ice Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon wears their ice gloves to punch the foe. Yes. Gloves made of ice. Single Target. Fist Move. Roll 1 Chance Dice to Freeze the Target.

name: Ice Shard
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With extraordinary swiftness, the Pokémon shoots an ice bullet like the fastest gun in the North Pole. Single Target. Reaction 1. Ranged.

name: Ice Spinner
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user covers their feet with sharp ice blades and skates through the field making gracious spins to hit the target. The battlefield ends up cut by the blades though. Single Target. Remove any active Terrain on the Battlefield.

name: Icicle Crash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon creates a big stalactite on top of the foe and lets it fall on top of it. Sometimes they manage to impale the foe to the ground. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Lethal. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target.

name: Icicle Spear
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A barrage of icicles shot against the target. They are small but sharp and pointy Single Target. Ranged. Successive Actions.

name: Icy Wind
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Polar winds sweep through the arena. Everyone starts to shiver and embrace themselves, trying to preserve a bit of warmth. Target All Foes in Range. Wind Move. Reduce by 1 the Dexterity of those affected.

name: Imprison
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 This move blocks all shared parts of a memory the user is well aware of. Moves, techniques, names, places, people or situations, no one will be able to recall those imprisoned memories. Target Self. While the User is on the battlefield, Moves known by the User cannot be used by foes. This effect ends if the User is removed from battle.

name: Incinerate
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A small blast of fire that instantly consumes small flammable objects. Single Target. All Foes in Range. Destroy the held item of those affected.

name: Infernal Parade
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 'You may not be the type to faint when things are odd or things are quaint. But seeing flames you know that ain’t will scorch you into dismay't will scorch you into dismay.' Single Target. Roll 2 Chance Dice to inflict 2nd Degree Burn on the Foe. *If the Target has an active Status Condition, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move.

name: Inferno
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user sets their target on fire with unforgiving flames. Abandon all hope. Single Target. Low Accuracy 3. Lethal. Inflict 3rd Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Inferno Overdrive
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Roll 3 Chance Dice to inflict 1st Degree Burn, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Infestation
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon summons a bothersome swarm to prevent the foe from escaping. The swarm will relentlessly attack the foe. Single Target. Blocks. Ongoing Damage. Duration 4 Rounds. Increase the Target's difficulty to Evade at Storyteller's discretion.

name: Ingrain
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon roots themselves to absorb nutrients directly from the ground. Target Self. The User heals 1 HP at the end of each Round. Spend 1 Will point to activate. Blocks. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Instruct
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sends a psychic command to a target, enabling the user to mentally tell them what to do. If you see a Pokémon attacking their own allies... this was it. Single Target. Copy Move. Unique Moves can't be copied. You may choose another Target(s) for the copied Move.

name: Ion Deluge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user electrifies all the particles in the environment with shocking results! Target Battlefield. Damage from Normal-Type Moves will be considered to be Electric-Type. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Iron Defense
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Iron body, iron will. This Pokémon is unbreakable. Target Self. Increase the User's Defense by 2.

name: Iron Head
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon charges to cure the foe’s iron deficit. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to flinch the Target.

name: Iron Tail
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With a hardened tail, the Pokémon swings against the foe to make a dent in their armor. Single Target. Low Accuracy 3. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Reduce the Target's Defense by 1.

name: Ivy Cudgel
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon creates a club out of thorny ivy vines, this club is infused with the power of nature, everchanging. Single Target. *The Type of this Move becomes the same as the User's Secondary Type if possible Otherwise their Main Type. This affects Weakness, Resistances, and STAB accordingly.

name: Jaw Lock
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user will capture its foe in a crushing jaw grip. It won’t let go no matter how much you try to separate them. The only way it will release its victim is if one of them faints. Single Target. Bite Move. Blocks both User and Target. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Jet Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The fist of justice strikes true, swift...and wet! Single Target. Reaction 1. Fist Move.

name: Judgment
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Sooner or later, everyone gets what they deserve. Single Target. Unique. Ignore Defenses. This Move's Type, Power and extra Added Effects are decided by Storyteller. If something would prevent this Move from dealing Damage, ignore it. This Move can't be Clashed.

name: Jump Kick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user launches itself up two stories high to pummel down with a powerful kick. Do not try it at home. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. If the Accuracy roll fails, Roll 4 Dice of Typeless Damage against the user, ignoring defenses.

name: Jungle Healing
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A stream of life force from plants and trees flow into the User and their Allies. Target User and Allies in Range. Heal any Status Ailment (Burn, Freeze, Paralysis, Poison & Sleep) on the Targets. Restore 1 HP to the targets. If successful spend 1 Will point to activate.

name: Karate Chop
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A classic karate technique, thi chop that has been practiced and mastered. Single Target. High Critical.

name: Kinesis
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A basic display of psychic abilities, making objects and other creatures levitate for a short period of time. Single Target. Reduce 1 success to all the Accuracy Rolls of the Target.

name: King's Shield
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Off my chair, jester! The king sits there! Target Self. Reaction 4. Shield Move. Reduce 3 Damage the User would receive from a Damaging Move. *If the Foe used a Non-Ranged Physical Move against the user, Reduce the foe's Strength by 2.

name: Knock Off
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon rudely smacks what their foe was holding. Single Target. *If the Target is holding an Item, Add 2 Dice to the Damage pool of this Move. The Target loses its Held Item afterwards.

name: Kowtow Cleave
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user gets on their knees and bows to its foe, then as the foe accepts this courtesy, a treacherous slash reveals the evil intent of the ruse. Single Target. Lethal. Cutter Move. Never Miss.

name: Land's Wrath
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The earth moves on its own, no attacker in sight. The floor crumbles and the ground shakes engulfing its victims. From the rubble, lush trees emerge a short time after. Target All Foes in Range. Ranged. Lethal. Unique.

name: Laser Focus
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through its incredible awarenes the Pokémon finds a straight path into a weak point of the foe. The attack that follows is devastating. Target Self. If the next Physical or Special Move the user performs gets 5 more successes required on the Accuracy Roll, ignore the Target's defenses on the Damage roll.

name: Lash Out
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user fulminates the foe with the power of its frustration and a shriek of despair. Single Target. *Add 3 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move if any of the user's Attributes/Traits was lowered this Round.

name: Last Resort
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon may be out of energy, but never out of options. Single Target. This Move will fail if the User has not successfully performed all of its known Moves at least once during the battle.

name: Last Respects
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon gathers the souls the departed and helps them fulfill their desire of revenge before moving on. Single Target. *Add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move for every ally that Fainted during this Battle Up to 8 Dice may be added this way.

name: Lava Plume
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The floor is lava. The sky is lava. Everywhere is lava. Hundreds of lava bits start raining scattered around the field. Area Move. Roll 3 Chance Dice to inflict 1st Degree Burn on those affected.

name: Leaf Blade
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Danger lies not on the material’s toughness but on its edge’s sharpness. Single Target. High Critical. Lethal. Cutter Move.

name: Leaf Storm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A furious onslaught of sharp leaves blasting against the target. The user gives their all in this attack. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Reduce the User's Special by 2.

name: Leaf Tornado
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A cluster of leaves and twigs swirls around the foe, getting in its eyes and making it difficult to aim properly Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Roll 5 Chance Dice to Reduce 1 Success from all Accuracy Rolls of the foe.

name: Leafage
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user throws leaf darts towards the foe. Single Target. Ranged.

name: Leech Life
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon clings to their foe, then bites in and starts to suck away its life force. Single Target. The User restores HP equal to half the damage dealt, rounded down.

name: Leech Seed
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe is infected with seed saplings taking root on their body. As the saplings grow, they'll absorb the vital energy of the foe and send it back to the user. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Spend 1 Will point to activate. At the end of each Round, Roll 2 Dice of Typeless Damage against the target ignoring defenses. The User heals 1 HP for every damage dealt this way. Grass-Type Pokémon are immune to this Effect. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Leer
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The vicious glare of a predator that triggers the flight response of their prey. Target All Foes in Range. Reduce by 1 the Defense of those affected.

name: Lick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon licks the foe. The foe is deeply disturbed by this creepy display of “affection”. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Paralyze the Target.

name: Life Dew
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user creates a fresh-water dew that restores energy and heals wounds. Target User and Allies in Range. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate. User and Allies in Range heal 1 HP at the end of each Round. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Light Of Ruin
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 By drawing energy from the Eternal Flower, the Pokémon unleashes all of its hurt. A beautiful light surrounds the area, yet the pain inside of its heart remains. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Recoil. Lethal. Unique.

name: Light Screen
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A barrier of light is created over half of the battlefield, all energy trying to go trough dissolves as it crosses it. Target the User's side of the field. Force Field. Activate a Force Field against Special Damage. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Liquidation
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon strikes while bursting a full-force blast of pressurized water. The water may cut or dent through the target’s armor. Single Target. Lethal. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Reduce the Target's Defense by 1.

name: Lock-On
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon’s eyes zoom into a moving target to strike with precision at the next opportunity. Target Self. The Next Move the User Performs has 2 automatic successes added on their Accuracy Roll.

name: Lovely Kiss
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A true love’s kiss that could turn any prince into a froakie and put any princess to sleep for a hundred years. Single Target. Put the Target to Sleep. Pokemon with this Move may forfeit their Beauty score completely, restore 1 Point to their Beauty Score. If the Pokemon forgets this move, restore 1 point to their Beauty Score.

name: Low Kick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses a kick to the sheen to throw the foe into the ground. The bigger they are, the harder they fall. Single Target. Add 1 Extra Damage Dice for every 50kg of the weight on the foe, up to 4 Dice may be added this way.

name: Low Sweep
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon crouches and spins with a kick to the foe’s legs. Leaving them with a limp for the rest of the fight. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Dexterity by 2.

name: Lucky Chant
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The magical incantation of an old priestess, through dance and song, good fortune and divine protection will come to you. This Move also removes evil spirits and curses. Target User and Allies in Range. Unique. Targets can Re-roll one un-successful die from all their rolls. Critical Hits do not grant Bonus dice against the Targets. Whole Scene Duration. Out of battle, good things happen at Storyteller's Discretion.

name: Lumina Crash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user flashes a light pattern that crashes the foe’s mind, leaving it acting erraticaly for a few moments. Single Target. Reduce the Foe's Sp. Defense by 2.

name: Lunar Blessing
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Put your faith on the moon, pray during dark times and it shall bring light into your heart, guide the strayed, and cast away the creatures from the shadows. *Target User or Target one Ally. Unique. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate. Complete Heal. Heal all status Ailments on the Target. Reduce 1 success to all Accuracy Rolls of one foe.

name: Lunar Dance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The moon shines at the darkest hours, reflecting sun’s life bringer light on those fallen into the night. Cresselia takes pity of their lost souls and guides them towards the dawn. Target Self. Unique. Roll the User's Remaining HP as Typeless Damage dice to itself. One allied Target restores its full HP and it is cured from any Status Condition, if it was fainted, restore conciousness. If the chosen Target is not in-battle, it is called out and ready to fight with the same remaining actions as the user.

name: Lunge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user charges against the foe at full force, not just to knock it down but to restrain it with its many limbs. Single Target. Reduce Target's Strength by 1.

name: Luster Purge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user engulfs itself in a blinding light and shoots a light beam at its foe, this light leaves the foe powerless to resist the assault. Single Target. Unique. Roll 5 Chance Dice to Reduce Sp. Defense by 1. *This effect can stack up to 3 times per Target.

name: Mach Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user launches a punch so quickly that it’s barely seen. Single Target. Reaction 1. Fist Move.

name: Magic Coat
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through a swift mind trick the Pokémon trick the foe into pouring their ill intent on itself. Target Self. Reaction 4. Support Moves that would target the user or its side of the field are inflicted to the foe performing the Move or that foe's side of the field instead.

name: Magic Powder
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon recites an enchantment and blows a cloud of pink dust on its Target. Afterwards, the target becomes incredibly good at guessing which card you got from a deck. Single Target. Powder Move. Change the target's Type to Psychic.

name: Magic Room
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The entire battlefield becomes a room on which the laws of the material world are rendered useless. Target Battlefield. Held items lose their effects. No items can be used. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Magical Leaf
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user sends out a floating leaf that will pursue the target until it hits. Single Target. Never Miss.

name: Magical Torque
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With the flick of a wand the user is spun around in a magic swirl that leaves them absolutely dizzy. Single Target. Lethal. Ranged. Roll 3 Chance dice to Confuse the Target.

name: Magma Storm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots a fiery eruption to its foe. Unable to escape and surrounded by the unbearable heat the foe’s survival is at risk. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Lethal. Blocks. Roll 3 Fire-Type Damage Dice ignoring defenses at the end of each Round. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Magnet Bomb
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user lights the fuse of a magnetized bomb. Guess who is the other magnet? Single Target. Ranged. Never Miss. Projectile Move.

name: Magnet Rise
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon creates a magnetic field to repel themselves from the ground, allowing it to float for a short period of time. Target Self. The User gains Immunity against Ground-Type Moves. Whole Scene Duration

name: Magnetic Flux
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon alters the magnetic field around itself to repel damage. This also affects other Pokémon sensible to magnetic charges. Target User and Allies in range. Increase by 1 the Defense and Sp. Defense of Electric-Type or Steel-Type Targets.

name: Magnitude
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user shakes the tectonic plates underneath the battlefield, trying to find a fault, when they do, this Move is devastating. Area Move. Ranged. Before you roll damage, Roll 1 die to determine this Move's Power. If the Target is out of range due to using the Move "Dig" this Move hits anyways.

name: Make It Rain
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon calls a rain of gold to fall from the sky. All the greedy Pokémon who threw themselves at the money get in range for an explosion of golden light. Worth it! Area Move. Reduce the User's Special by 2. At the end of the battle give the User and every Trainer whose Pokemon was hit, Money equal to their Rank: Starter/Rookie - 100 Standard - 250 Advanced - 500 Ace or more - 1000

name: Malignant Chain
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 This chain contains the most potent neurotoxin currently known. It boosts physical appearance, yet totally suppresses the mind and soul, turning the target into the user’s puppet. Single Target. Unique. Roll 5 Chance Dice to Badly Poison the Target. At the end of the Round, if the Target was Poisoned by this Move, roll their Loyalty, get at least 3 successes, if it fails, from the next Round the Target becomes the user's Ally untl the poison is healed.

name: Mat Block
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses a mat as a shield. Target User and Allies in Range. Shield Move. Reaction 1. Reduce 3 Damage from a Physical or Special Move.

name: Matcha Gotcha
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user invites the foe to a hebal tea ceremony. As the tea is served and the foe is off guard, the user throws the hot tea on them, then proceeds to enjoy their own cup. Target All Foes in Range. Projectile Move. Low Accuracy 1. The User restores hp equal to half the damage dealt, rounded down. Roll 2 Chance Dice to inflict 1st Degree Burn on the Target. If the user is Frozen solid, destroy the ice block.

name: Max Airstream
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Increase the Dexterity of User and Allies in Range by 1.

name: Max Darkness
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Reduce by 1 the Special of those Affected.

name: Max Flare
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Activate the Effects of Sunny Weather (Disregard time of day or location) Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Max Flutterby
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Reduce by 1 the Special of those Affected.

name: Max Geyser
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Activate the Effects of Rain Weather. (Disregard location) Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Max Guard
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target Max Self. Shield Move. Reaction 5. Reduce 5 Damage this Max Pokemon would receive from a Physical or Special Move. Negate the Added Effects of Any Move that targets the Max User

name: Max Hailstorm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Activate the Effects of Hail Weather. (Disregard location) Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Max Knuckle
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Increase he Strength of Userand Allies in Range by 1.

name: Max Lightning
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Activate the Effects of Electric Terrain. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Max Mindstorm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Activate the Effects of Psychic Terrain. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Max Ooze
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Increase the Special of User and Allies in Range by 1.

name: Max Overgrowth
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Activate the Effects of Grassy Terrain. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Max Phantasm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Reduce by 1 the Defense of those Affected.

name: Max Quake
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Increase the Sp. Defense of the User and Allies in Range by 1.

name: Max Rockfall
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Activate the Effects of Sandstorm Weather. (Disregard location Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Max Starfall
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Activate the Effects of Misty Terrain. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Max Steelspike
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Increase the Defense of the User and Allies in Range by 1.

name: Max Strike
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Reduce by 1 the Dexterity of those Affected.

name: Max Wyrmwind
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Target all foes in Range or a Single Max Target. Reduce by 1 the Strength of those Affected.

name: Me First
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user anticipates the next Move the target will use and impatiently interrupts to be the first in line. Single Target. Reaction 1. Copy Move. Support Moves can't be copied. Unique Moves can't be copied. You may choose another Target(s) for the copied Move.

name: Mean Look
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 An intense and ever-vigilant stare that surveils all possible paths the foe has to escape. Single Target. Blocks. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Meditate
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through meditation the Pokémon brings forward their mind’s strength into their body. Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Special and Sp. Defense.

name: Mega Drain
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user absorbs a big amount of vital energy and nutrients from the target to feed from. Single Target. The User restores HP equal to half the damage dealt, rounded down.

name: Mega Kick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A mighty kick. This sheer muscle-power strike can turn concrete pillars into rubble. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2.

name: Mega Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon packs everything into this punch to pulverize their foe with a single strike. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Fist Move.

name: Megahorn
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses its strong horn(s) to pierce their foe and deal massive damage. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Lethal.

name: Memento
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 As they take their last breath, the Pokémon leaves behind an imprint of regret on their foe. Single Target. The User faints. Reduce by 2 the foe's Strength, Dexterity, Special, Defense, and Sp. Defense. Whole Scene Duration. This effect does not end by switching out the affected Pokemon.

name: Metal Burst
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Those who live by the sword will die by the sword, or, in this case, by an explosion. Single Target. Late Reaction 5. Can only be used if Target's last Move on User was a Physical or Special Move. Roll dice equal to Target's last damage pool rolled against the User plus 2 Dice. Ignore Defenses.

name: Metal Claw
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses the foe as a whetstone. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Roll 1 Chance Die to Increase the User's Strength by 1.

name: Metal Sound
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A horrible screeching sound rumbles in the foe’s ears. Some people will try to convince you that this is good music. Single Target. Sound Move. Reduce the Target's Sp. Defense by 2.

name: Meteor Assault
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon will make an incredible jump to the sky, then lunge towards the foe at a staggering speed, crashing the ground upon impact. The user is left very tired. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Lethal. Must Recharge.

name: Meteor Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user overflows with galactic energy while summoning a small meteor to impact the foe. A theory suggests this move might have caused the extintion of prehistoric Pokémon. Single Target. Charge Move. Increase the User's Special by 1 the moment it begins charging.

name: Meteor Mash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A great meteor fell, leading to the extinction of all prehistoric Pokémon. The user re-enacts that meteor on a smaller scale, as it only needs to extinguish one. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Fist Move. Roll 2 Chance Dice to increase the User's Strength by 1.

name: Metronome
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon waves their hands following a specific rythm, the energy around follows the cadence and manifests as a Move at random. Single Target. Copy Move. Roll a die to determine Physical or Special category, roll a die to determine this Move's Power. The appearance, Type and added effects of this Move becomes the same of a Physical or Special Move of the same Power at Storyteller's Discretion.

name: Mighty Cleave
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With a mighty light, the Pokémon cleaves through the foe’s protections and strikes like a boulder. Single Target. Cutter Move. Ignore Shield Moves & Force Fields active on the foe or their side of the field.

name: Milk Drink
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon drinks a glass of milk. Full of calcium and vitamin D it is a healthy and delicious refreshment. Target Self. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate. Out of battle, this Move can be used on allies.

name: Mimic
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon is a quick learner. They imitate their target’s movements and just like that they get a new set of powers. Single Target. Copy Move. Replace "Mimic" with the copied Move. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Mind Blown
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon has had a terrible day and has a headache to match. Try not to disturb the peace because their head really feels like exploding. Area Move. Recoil.

name: Mind Reader
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 In a split of second, the Pokémon reads the foe’s mind so they know exactly what to do next. Single Target. The User has 2 automatic and unremovable successes on the next Accuracy or Evasion Roll against the Target.

name: Minimize
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon compacts their body. Becoming a much smaller target to be difficult to hit. But a well placed stomp may leave them squished on the floor, though. Target Self. The User can now make up to 5 Evasions per Round. Reduce the User's Height and Weight in half. The user is now Vulernable to: Stomp. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Miracle Eye
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon opens up the third eye. Their sight trascends the barriers of flesh. No one goes undetected. Target Self. The User's Psychic-Type Moves ignore Dark-Type Immunity. Target cannot Evade the User's Moves. This Pokemon's Accuracy cannot be Reduced by Move's, Items or Abilities (ie Sand Attack, Bright Powder, etc.). Whole Scene Duration

name: Mirror Coat
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user gathers the harmful energies around themselves and bounces them back to their source. Single Target. Late Reaction 5. Can only be used if Target's last Move on User was a Special Move. For damage, roll dice equal to Target's last damage pool rolled against the User plus 2. Ignore Defenses.

name: Mirror Move
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon parrots the target cries and movements. In an almost perfect impersonation that manages to copy its powers. Single Target. Copy Move. Unique Moves can't be copied. You may choose another Target(s) for the copied Move.

name: Mirror Shot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through a series of reflective surfaces, the Pokémon redirects a beam through unexpected directions. The foe is at a loss; they don’t know if what they see is real or a reflection. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Confuse the Target.

name: Mist
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A thick layer of mist cloaks a pack of pokémon, those with the intent to trick and weaken them will have to find them first. Target User and Allies in Range. Targets cannot have their Attributes or Traits Reduced. Previously Reduced Attributes and Traits remain. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Mist Ball
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user engulfs its foe with a cloud, this soothing mist keeps evil intents from surfacing ino the Target’s mind. Single Target. Unique. Projectile Move. Roll 5 Chance Dice to Reduce the Target's Special by 1. *This Effect can be stacked up to 3 times per target.

name: Misty Explosion
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user razes the field with a searing nuke of made of love, joy, kisses, and pink glitter. It is deadly. Area Attack. Lethal. The User faints after using this Move. *If Misty Terrain is active, add 4 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move.

name: Misty Terrain
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The battlefield is shrouded by a pink mist that feels protective and soothing. This mist is able to render even the fiercest beasts into calm. Target Battlefield. All Status Ailments and Conditions are cured and no more can be inflicted. Physical & Special Dragon-Type Moves have Power 0. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Moonblast
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user becomes a champion of lunar justice. In the name of the moon, they will right the wrongs and triumph over evil! Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Reduce Target's Special by 1.

name: Moongeist Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A cold reflection of the moon shines upon the target, it doesn’t hurt physically but those who stare directly into the light simply collapse. Single Target. Lethal. Unique. If anything on the foe's side would prevent this move from dealing damage (Pokemon Type, Abilities, Shield Moves, Weather or Force Fields) ignore it. This Move cannot be clashed.

name: Moonlight
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses the moon’s power to heal their injuries. Target Self. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate. Night Time and Sunny Weather increase it to Complete Heal. Rain, Sandstorm and Hail Weather reduceto Minor Heal of 1 HP.

name: Morning Sun
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon feels revitalized with the bright sun early in the mornings. Target Self. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate. If Sunny Weather is in effect, this Move becomes a Complete Heal. If performed under Rain, Sandstorm, Hail or Snowy Weather, this Move is a Minor heal only heals 1 HP.

name: Mortal Spin
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user spins around the field, cutting through obstacles and shooting small darts full of a toxic venom. The earth is now poisoned and left barren. All Foes in Range. Poison those Affected. Remove Entry Hazards, Terrains (ie Grassy Terrain, Misty Terrain), Ongoing Damage and Leech seed from the User or their side of the field.

name: Mountain Gale
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Ranged. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Foe.

name: Mud Bomb
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots a ball of mud to burst on their victim’s face in an attempt to blind them. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Projectile Move. Roll 3 Chance Die to Reduce 1 success to all Accuracy rolls of the Target.

name: Mud Shot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 By shooting a stream of mud at their target, the user manages to impair their movement. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Dexterity by 1.

name: Mud Slap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A mud ball splatters right into the foe’s face, reducing their field of vision. Single Target. Reduce 1 success to all the Accuracy Rolls of the Target.

name: Mud Sport
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user covers the whole field with mud. Electricity can’t flow properly, so Electric attacks will be severely impaired. Target Battlefield. Physical & Special Electric-Type Moves have Power 0. Pokemon weak to Electric-Type Moves won't receive Super-Effective Damage from them. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Muddy Water
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 When you can’t see what creatures lurk inside the water, that’s when you know they are the ones that went fishing. Target All Foes in Range. Low Accuracy 2. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Reduce 1 success to all the Accuracy Rolls of those affected.

name: Multi-Attack
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A weird-looking Pokémon charged against its foes, the same attack released different kinds of energy depending on the disk the Pokémon is holding. Single Target. Unique. This Move's type will change to match the User's Main Type.

name: Mystical Fire
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 An iridicent fire that not just burns in the physical world but in the spiritual world as well. Single Target. Reduce Target's Special by 1.

name: Mystical Power
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The power is inside you. You can feel it in your heart, you can see it in your mind. Believe in yourself and take it! Target Self. Increase by 2 the User's lowest Attribute/Trait. If an Attribute/Trait Score is 6 or More, this effect fails. Different Attributes/Traits may be increased this way.

name: Nasty Plot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Rubbing both hands and laughing sinisterly the Pokémon rejoices in the evil plans they’ll soon carry out. Target Self. Increase User's Special by 2.

name: Natural Gift
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user throws their held berry at the foe, the myriad of flavors has surprisingly different results. Single Target. Ranged. The User loes its held berry. *The Type of this Move changes according to the berry used. See more on p. 530

name: Nature Power
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon makes use of the terrain and asks for nature's aid in battle. Single Target. *The Type of this Move is determined by the environment or active Terrain. See more on p. 530

name: Nature's Madness
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The forces of nature attack as if they had a will of their own. Water will try to drown you, plants will trap you, lightning will come out of nowhere, even your own body will fail you. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Damage Roll is Half of the Target's remaining HP (up to 10 Dice) Rounded down. If the remaining HP of the Target is 1, this move fails. Ignore Defenses.

name: Needle Arm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon flails their arms with violence against the foe, the arms have grown thorns that sting like needles. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target.

name: Never-Ending Nightmare
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Ignore Ability, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Night Daze
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe is engulfed by a pitch-black darkness that obscure its vision and torments its mind. Single Target. Roll 4 Chance Dice to Reduce 1 Success from all Accuracy rolls of the foe. Outside of battle, obscuring effects last for a whole scene.

name: Night Shade
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user casts a dark and frightening mirage surrounding the foe to give them a panic attack. Single Target. Roll Ghost-Type Damage Dice according to the User's Rank: Starter 1 Die / Rookie 2 Dice / Standard 4 Dice/ Advacned 6 Dice / Expert 8 Dice / Ace and forward 10 Dice. Ignore Defenses.

name: Night Slash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user looks for a weak spot, tearing the soft flesh apart with a single vile slash of its claws. Single Target. Lethal. High Critical. Cutter Move.

name: Nightmare
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user is believed to transport themselves to the land of dreams to torment their victims with vivid night terrors. The vicitms wake up with unexplainable injuries. Single Target. Can only be used if the Target has the Sleep Condition. Deal 1 Typeless Damage to the Target after every attempt to resist its Sleep Condition where it doesn't wake up.

name: No Retreat
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 No surrender. No retreat. Until victory, always! Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Strength, Dexterity, Special, Defense and Sp. Defense. Blocks. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Noble Roar
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The mighty roar of a king. It commands respect and authority over anyone who listens. Single Target. Sound Move. Reduce by 1 the Target's Strength and Special.

name: Noxious Torque
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Surrounded by noxious gases, the victim is spun around at high speeds. Single Target. Lethal. Ranged. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Poison the Target.

name: Nuzzle
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon gives a cute nuzzle at their target, it looks adorable until you see the sparks. Single Target. Paralyze the foe.

name: Oblivion Wing
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A dark wind rises, turning everything it touches into dust to be scattered until nothing remains. People, Pokémon, plants, everything fades like a distant memory. Single Target. Lethal. High Critical. Unique.

name: Obstruct
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 In a reckless action, the user charges against the foe to stop its momentum and block its incoming attack. Being so close allows the user to reach for weak spots. Target Self. Reaction 4. Shield Move. Reduce 3 Damage the User would receive from a Damaging Move. *If the Foe used a Non-Ranged Physical Move against the user Reduce the foe's Defense by 2.

name: Octazooka
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A jet of black ink shot straight into the foe’s eyes. This Move is hard to aim but returns the favor. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Projectile Move. Roll 5 Chance Dice to Reduce 1 success to all Accuracy Rolls of the foe.

name: Octolock
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user wraps its tentacles to immobilize the foe. Being so close enables the user to find weak spots. Single Target. Block. Reduce by 1 the Target's Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Odor Sleuth
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses their keen sense of smell to corner the foe and find it when it tries to scurry away Single Target. The Foe cannot Evade Moves performed by the User. User ignores Ghost-Type immunity to Normal and Fight-Type Moves and vice versa. Out of battle, Add successes of this Move to any roll for Tracking targets.

name: Ominous Wind
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The battlefield gets absolutely silent, the only noise is a cold wind draft that gives the target chills and goosebumps. Observing from the shadows, the user rejoices in the fear. Single Target. Wind Move. Roll 1 Chance Die to Increase by 1 the User's Strength, Dexterity, Special, Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Order Up
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user waits for orders and adheres to the strategy of a smaller but smarter ally. Single Target. Unique. If the User is giving cover to a #978 Tatsugiri Ally. Increase by 1 an Attribute depending on the Ally's color. *Orange - Strength *Red - Defense *Yellow - Dexterity

name: Origin Pulse
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sends a giant pulse underwater that creates a chain reaction in the tides, creating a series of tsunami waves. Not even water-pokemon can surf through these wild currents. Target All Foes in Range. Low Accuracy 2. Lethal. Unique. Ignore the Target's immunity to Water-Type Damage. If a Target is "Out of Range" due to using a Move, this Move hits anyways.

name: Outrage
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The true nature of dragon-types unleashed. The user is consumed by a primal fury that won’t stop until everything has ben razed to the ground. Afterwards the Pokémon is confused. Target Random Foe. Rampage.

name: Overdrive
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses its own body as an amplifier for the energizing sounds it produces. Target All Foes in Range. Sound Move.

name: Overheat
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A furious scorching flame that turns everything on the user’s radius to ash. This incredible destructive display leaves the user exhausted. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Lethal. Reduce User's Special by 2.

name: Pain Split
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user channels their pain into the foe to relieve their agony. The foe gets to feel the burn of the damage it has caused. Single Target. Spend 1 Will Point to activate. *Deal up to 3 Typeless Damage to the Target, Heal 1 HP to the User for every Damage dealt this way. This Move Fails if the User has more than Half HP rounded down. This Move cannot reduce a Target to less than 1 HP.

name: Parabolic Charge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon lets loose a big electric charge from its body. The charge comes back to it even bigger. Area Move. The User restore HP equal to half the damage to one Target, rounded down.

name: Parting Shot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user throws one last threat against the foe before taking their leave. The foe is left too frightened to try to stand up against the user and their gang. Single Target. Switcher Move for the User. Reduce by 1 the Foe's Strength and Special.

name: Pay Day
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 This Pokémon brings good fortune to businesses and trainers alike. Make sure to use some of that hard earned money to buy them a treat. Single Target. Ranged. At the end of the battle give Money to your Trainer Equal to their Rank: Starter/Rookie - 100 Standard - 250 Advanced - 500 Ace or more - 1000

name: Payback
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Some say the best revenge is a successful and happy life, but not this Pokémon. Single Target. *Add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move if the User has already received Damage from the Target this Round.

name: Peck
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Raise crows and they’ll peck your foe’s eyes. Single Target.

name: Perish Song
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A song for mourning the departed. Although it sounds beautiful, it fills the heart with grief and despair, making the listeners feel as if they were laying on their death bed. Area Move. Sound Move. Three Rounds after this Move is used, deal damage to those affected equal to their remaining HP. Removing from battle prevents this effect.

name: Petal Blizzard
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A raging blizzard of petals and leaves sweeps through the entire area, leaving a pleasant floral scent and destruction in its wake. Area Move. Ranged. Wind Move.

name: Petal Dance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon casts a huge cluster of petals to dance in the wind; they let nature run its course, as the wind will choose who will take the devastating blow. Target Random Foe. Rampage.

name: Phantom Force
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon disappears into a dark dimension to infiltrate even the most impenetrable fortress. It may reappear during its next action. Single Target. Charge move. Out of Range while Charging. Lethal. Ignore any Cover, Shield Moves, and/or Force Fields active on the Target.

name: Photon Geyser
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon attacks with a large pillar of light that comes out from they stand, either the blazing energy or the crushing strike are enough to knock foes out. Single Target. Lethal. Unique. This Move's Damage Pool, can be rolled with either Strength or Special Attribute, dealing Physical or Special Damage respectively. Choose whatever is most convenient for the user.

name: Pika Papow
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The User lets out its energy in the form of a lightning strike, the happier the user feels the more energized it will be. Single Target. *Add 1 Extra Die to the Damage Pool of this Move for every point of Happiness on the User. Up to 5 Dice may be added this way. If the user of this Move is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.

name: Pin Missile
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots a barrage of stingers or spikes that pierce like needles. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Ranged. Successive Actions.

name: Plasma Fists
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user charges its fists with electricity, upon impact, the charge materializes into plasma that adds an electric element to all of its Normal moves. Single Target. Fist Move. If successful, all Normal-Type Moves of the User will be considered Electric-Type. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Play Nice
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon starts to play with the foe. They are firendly, respectful, and thank the foe for the fun time. The foe does not want to fight, they want to keep playing. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Strength by 1.

name: Play Rough
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon and their foe start a playful wrestle that soon escalates into a furious wrestling match. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Roll 1 Chance Dice to Reduce Target's Strength by 1.

name: Pluck
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon lands on top of the foe and starts pecking them in search for parasites or some other tasty treat to snack on. Single Target. *If the Target is holding a Berry, Add 1 Die to the Damage pool of this Move. The User also eats the berry and gains its effects.

name: Poison Fang
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon goes for a quick bite, releasing the foe just as fast. Let the poison slowly consume the foe from the inside out. No need to spend more energy when a drop is more than enough. Single Target. Bite Move. Roll 5 Chance Dice to Badly Poison the Target.

name: Poison Gas
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A thick cloud of toxic gas that causes violent coughs and red eyes. Target All Foes in Range. Low Accuracy 1. Poison those affected.

name: Poison Jab
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon is set on injecting venom directly into the foe’s bloodstream. They can do it the easy way or the hard way. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Poison the Target.

name: Poison Powder
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A cloud of noxius powder that immediately sends the target’s immune system into overdrive. Single Target. Low Accuracy 3. Powder Move. Poison the Target.

name: Poison Sting
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A tiny stab that causes big troubles. Single Target. Ranged. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Poison the Target.

name: Poison Tail
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A sharp edge dipped in venom—an attack in bad blood in all senses of the word. Single Target. High Critical. Roll 1 Chance Die to Poison the Target.

name: Pollen Puff
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon creates a puff of pollen that explodes on the foe's face and gives them a terrible allergy. When consumed, these puffs are sweet and very nutritious. Single Target. Projectile Move. * Or target One Ally. *When this move is used against an ally, it will heal 2 HP instead of damage, Spend 1 Will Point to get this effect.

name: Poltergeist
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon’s spirit possesses an Item and attacks with that cursed object. It is said that if the Pokémon lingers too long possesing an object, it’ll have trouble getting out. Single Target. Can only be used if the Target is Holding an Item or if Items have been used on the Target's side of the field.

name: Population Bomb
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon and their family attack the foe in waves. Parents, children, cousins, aunts, uncles, and extended relatives, the whole family tree will appear on an onslaught. Single Target. Unique. Low Accuracy 2. Successive Actions.

name: Pounce
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon stands very still, and just as their foe approaches, they suddenly launch into attacking. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Dexterity by 1.

name: Pound
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user pounds the target’s head. Simple Single Target.

name: Powder
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe gets covered by a very flammable powder, the smallest source of fire will ignite it with explosive results. Single Target. Powder Move. The next time the Target uses a Fire-Type Move, Roll Typeless Damage Dice equal to that Move's power, ignore defenses.

name: Powder Snow
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A light layer of snow flakes covers the foes, as the layers pile up the possibilities to be trapped into the snow increase. Target All Foes in Range. Roll 1 Chance Die to Freeze those affected.

name: Power Gem
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With a crystal gem, the Pokémon will always save the day! Single Target.

name: Power Shift
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon knows that sometimes the best defense is a good offense. Target Self. Switch the User's Strength with its Defense and its Special with its Sp. Defense.

name: Power Split
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through a mental link both Pokémon are aware of each other strengths, which ends up evening the odds. Single Target. Average the User's Strength and Special with the Target's, rounded down.

name: Power Swap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon enters their foe’s mind to steal its power and implant on them the idea of their own frailty. Single Target. Whole Scene Duration. Switch the User's Strength and Special with the Target's.

name: Power Trick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon tricks their own mind to believe their vitality is their power and vice versa. Target Self. Switch the User's Strength with their Defense and Special with their Sp. Defense.

name: Power Trip
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 In the heat of the battle, the Pokémon gets carried away, reveling on their own power. Single Target. *Add up to 7 Dice to the Damage Pool of this move for every Attribute increase the user has. (ie The user has 2 increased points on Defense, add 2 Damage dice).

name: Power Whip
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A thick vine full of thorns is waved as a whip against the enemy. As devastating as the blow would be, the incoming attack is easily percieved by the foe. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2.

name: Power-Up Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A punch to test the impact’s surface and adjust the level of strength required to punch through it. Single Target. Fist Move. Increase User's Strength by 1.

name: Precipice Blades
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Giant blades emerge from the earth impaling the unlucky souls nearby. Do you think you are safe in the air? Think again... Target All Foes in Range. Low Accuracy 2. Ranged. Lethal. Unique. Ignore the Target's Immunity to Ground-Type Damage. If a Target is "Out of Range" due to using any Move, this Move hits anyways.

name: Present
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user hands out a lovely present box. Time to find out if the foe has been naugthy or nice Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. *Target rolls 1 die with a 50-50 chance of dealing 2 Set Damage to the Target or Restoring 2 HP to the Target.

name: Prismatic Laser
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through a prism, the user shoots a concentrated laser beam that pierces everything that comes in contact with it. The effort leaves the user mentally exhausted. Single Target. Lethal. Must Recharge. Unique.

name: Protect
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A mighty energy shield materializes in front of the user to to deflect attacks and dispel ill effects. Target Self. Reaction 5. Shield Move. Reduce 3 Damage this Pokemon would receive from a Physical or Special Move. Negate the Added Effects of Moves that target the user.

name: Psybeam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe’s mind isassaulted by a mental ray, afterwards they may suffer from hallucinations. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Confuse the Target.

name: Psyblade
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon attacks using an ethereal blade. Electric energy will increase the sharpness of its edge. Single Target. Lethal. Cutter Move. *If Electric Terrain is active, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move.

name: Psych Up
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon mentalizes themselves stronger than anyone. They feel good. They can win. They. Can. Do. This! Single Target. The User gets the same Attribute/Trait Increases and Reductions the Target has.

name: Psychic
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The most iconic Psychic attack, the foe starts floating in the air and its swayed around by telekinesis as their mental barrier crumbles. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Reduce the Target's Sp. Defense by 1.

name: Psychic Fangs
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon bares its fangs to bite the foe, psychic energy begins piercing before the actual fangs make contact. Single Target. Bite Move. If there is a Force Field on the Target's side of the field, destroy it.

name: Psychic Noise
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The target gets a migraine so awful it can only hear white noise inside of its head. Single Target. Target can't restore HP. Duration 2 Rounds.

name: Psychic Terrain
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The arena becomes radiated by psychic waves. Everyone feels their mind slog due to the buzz in their heads, making all tasks take longer than they should. Target Battlefield. Add 1 Extra Damage Dice to all Physical & Special Psychic-Type Moves. Pokemon without immunity to Ground can't use Moves with Reaction or Late Reaction. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Psycho Boost
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon releases an explosion of all of its concentrated psychic power in a devastating explosion, afterwards the user will be extremely tired. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Lethal. Unique. Reduce User's Special by 2.

name: Psycho Cut
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user sends out an invisible sword made with psychic energy that slashes targets even if they are far away Single Target. Ranged. High Critical. Cutter Move.

name: Psycho Shift
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through sheer mental suggestion, the user actually makes their target feel their sickness. The user convinces themselves they are healed afterwards. Single Target. Copy all of the User's Status Ailments into the Target. Afterwards, Heal the User from any Status Ailment.

name: Psyshield Bash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user cloaks itself in a shield of psychic energy then rams into the foe. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Increase by 1 the User's Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Psyshock
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The shock is mental, the blow is real. Single Target. This Move is resisted with the Target's Defense instead of its Sp. Defense.

name: Psystrike
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through sheer psychic power, the user materializes its energy to deal a heavy strike to its foe. Single Target. Lethal. Unique. This Move is resisted with the Foe's Defense instead of its Sp. Defense.

name: Psywave
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A powerful mental wave assault’s the target’s brain directly. Everything, from forgotten memories to the secrets of the universe bombard its mind in just a few seconds. Single Target. Roll Psychic-Type Damage Dice according to the User's Rank: Starter 1 Die / Rookie 2 Dice / Standard 4 Dice/ Advacned 6 Dice / Expert 8 Dice / Ace and forward 10 Dice. Ignore Defenses.

name: Punishment
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 You shouldn’t have done that... Single Target. *Add up to 7 Dice to the Damage Pool of the Move for every Attribute increase the target has. (ie The target has 2 increased points on Strength, add 2 Damage dice).

name: Purify
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The target is covered by a gelatinous goo to which every impurity sticks. The user then convinces the target eats this goo, and ends up pleasantly surprised by the sweet flavor. Single Target. Heal a Target's Status Ailment (Burns, Freeze, Paralysis, Poisons, Sleep). *If a Status Ailment was healed this way, the User may spend 1 Will point to restore 2 HP.

name: Pursuit
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon is relentless in its pursuit of their target, striking it just as it believed it had escaped. Single Target. *If a Target hit by this Move is recalled, attempts to Run Away, uses a Switcher Move or is the Target of a Switcher Move, Deal 2 Typeless Damage to it. Outside of battle, aid in catching a fleeing target.

name: Pyro Ball
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon lights a heavy stone on fire and kicks it while it’s ablaze. The hit is pretty heavy already, the fire is just for showing off. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Projectile Move. Ranged. Roll 1 Chance die to inflict 2nd Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Quash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user represses the foe through intimidation so it thinks twice before acting. Single Target. Target's will go last in the Initiative Order. Whole Scene Duration. This effect does not end by switching out the affected Pokemon. If used again, the previous Target has their order in the initiative restored.

name: Quick Attack
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 An attackas fight as lightning. Single Target. Reaction 1. Out of battle, double the Pokemon's movement speed.

name: Quick Guard
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user reacts instinctively and defends itself and its team mates, nullyfing the effects of the fastest attacks. Target User and Allies in Range. Reaction 3. Shield Move. Reduce 3 Damage from a Physical or Special Move with Priority. Negate the Added effects of Reaction and late Reaction Moves targeting the User and Allies.

name: Quiver Dance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A mystical and beautiful dance that increases a Pokémon focus in combat. Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Dexterity, Special an Sp. Defense.

name: Rage
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user gets angry and throws a tantrum against the foe. The more the battle continues the angrier the user gets. Single Target. If a foe damages the User with a Physical or Special Move in the same round after using this Move. Increase the User's Strength by 1. This effect can stack up to 3 Times.

name: Rage Fist
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon focuses all of their rage into a single fist, the more they suffered the more dark energy will concentrate. Single Target. Fist Move. *Add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move for every time the User has received Damage this Round, up to 8 Dice may be added this way.

name: Rage Powder
