description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon releases an irritating powder that itches and enrages its foes into full-attack mode. Target Self. Reaction 2. Powder Move. All of the Foe's Physical and Special Moves will Target the user if able. Duration 1 Round.

name: Raging Bull
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon charges against a foe, trampling through with a righteous fury, a blazing rage, a cold wrath, or maybe just the senseless desire for violence. Single Target. *The Type of this Move becomes the same as the User's Secondary Type if possible, otherwise their Main Type. This affects Weakness, Resistances and STAB accordingly.

name: Raging Fury
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon goes mad with rage, spitting fire viciously all over the battlfield and barely recognizing friend from foe. Target Random foe. Ranged. Rampage.

name: Rain Dance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon performs a peculiar dance in the middle of the field, everyone thinks it silly until the first thunder rumbles. Target Battlefield. Activate Rain Weather. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Rapid Spin
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon makes a swift spin to strike at the foe and in the process everything laying close to the user is scattered out of the battlefield. Single Target. Increase the User's Dexterity by 1. Remove Entry Hazards, Terrains (ie Grassy Terrain, Misty Terrain), Ongoing Damage and Leech seed from the User and/or their side of the field.

name: Razor Leaf
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user sends out a barrage of sharp razor-like leaves. “Death by a thousand cuts” would be the best depiction. Target All Foes in Range. Cutter Move. Ranged. High Critical.

name: Razor Shell
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sharpens a seashell to use as a cutting tool, when this shell manages to cut through the foe’s armor, they’ll finally will have mastered the craft. Single Target. Cutter Move. Roll 1 Chance Die to Reduce the Target's Defense by 1.

name: Razor Wind
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sways the winds while charging what appears to be an invisible blade made of pressurized air. The wind slices everything it touches as if it were a razor. Target All Foes in Range. Charge Move. High Critical. Cutter Move.

name: Recover
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses their energy to quickly mend wounds, their regenerative powers are beyond the imagination. Target Self. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate.

name: Recycle
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 One Pokémon’s trash is another one’s treasure. Target Self. The Pokemon reuses an Item (Berries, Potions, Full Heal, etc.) that has already been spent during the battle on any side of the battlefield. Recycle can't be used more than 3 times per battle by the User.

name: Reflect
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 An ethereal mirror-like wall cuts the battlefield in half, bouncing back the impact of most blows. Target the User's side of the field. Force Field. Activate a Force Field against Physical Damage. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Reflect Type
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon is able to rewrite their own cellular composition at will to match that of potential predators. Increasing chances of survival. Target Self. Change the User's Type to match the one(s) of a foe. (ie Staryu is battle vs Charizard, their type will become Fire/Flying intead of Water) Whole Scene Duration.

name: Refresh
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon takes a few seconds to cool off, refocus, and get back in the game. Target Self. The User heals itself from any Burn, Freeze, Poison and Paralysis. Sleep is not healed through this effect.

name: Relic Song
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user sings and dances to a melody so beautiful you won’t notice you were crying while listening to it. Target All Foes in Range. Sound Move. Unique. Roll 1 Chance Die to put the foe to Sleep. If successful, the User may choose to change its form afterwards.

name: Rest
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Yeah, this seems like a good spot to take a nap. Target Self. Complete Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate. Put the User to Sleep.

name: Retaliate
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With tears of rage in their eyes, the Pokémon will not let the fall of a friend go without punishment. Single Target. *If an Ally fainted during this or the previous Round, add Extra Dice to the damage pool, equal to the user's Loyalty. Up to 5 dice may be added this way. This effect only activates once per fainted Ally.

name: Return
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A loved Pokémon grows kind and happy, a Move fueled by gratitude. Single Target. *Add 1 Extra Die to the Damage Pool of this Move for every point of Happiness on the User, up to 5 Dice may be added this way.

name: Revelation Dance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon performs a dance, the dance’s energy influences the Type of this Move. Single Target. *The Type of this Move becomes the same as the User's Main Type. This affects Weakness, Resistances, and STAB accordingly.

name: Revenge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Best served cold. Single Target. *If the User has already received Damage this Round, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool.

name: Reversal
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user gathers their mettle to block away the pain and focus only on hitting harder. Single Target. *Add 1 Extra Die to the Damage Pool for every missing HP the User has. Up to 5 Dice may be added this way.

name: Revival Blessing
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon prays to the skies with such selfless fervor and devotion that a miracle is granted. Target One Ally. The User must spend all of their remaining Will points, if the user has no remaining Will points, this Move fails. Restore conciousness and 2 HP to a fainted ally. If no Ally is fainted this Move fails. The ally does not need to be active in combat.

name: Rising Voltage
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A shockwave travels through the ground, then rises as a golden pillar of thunderbolts. Single Target. Lethal. *If Electric Terrain is active, add 3 Extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move.

name: Roar
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With a potent roar, to make the foe reconsider their intentions. Single Target. Late Reaction 6. Switcher Move for the Foe. In the wild, the battle may end.

name: Roar Of Time
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through a terrifying roar, Dialga bounds the forces of time on a single area, the unfortunate target will be trapped in a time warp, growing old in a matter of miliseconds. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Must Recharge. Lethal. Unique. If successful, the target can't take any action unless they spend 1 Will point per action attempted. Duration 1 Round.

name: Rock Blast
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A rock shrapnel, the user shoots tiny bullet-like pebbles. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Ranged. Successive Actions. Projectile Move.

name: Rock Climb
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon climbs over the foe and rests atop of their head as if it were the top of a mountain. This results confusing for the foe. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Confuse the Target. Out of battle it aids to climb cliffs and mountains with ease.

name: Rock Polish
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Smooth the rough edges, no need to grind about in life. Target Self. Increase the User's Dexterity by 2.

name: Rock Slide
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Don’t worry, even if you are not the fastest one in the race, you can still win by a landslide. Target All Foes in Range. Low Accuracy 1. Ranged. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch those affected.

name: Rock Smash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A hit powerful enough to destroy rocks and crack armor. Single Target. Roll 5 Chance Dice to Reduce the Target's Defense by 1.

name: Rock Throw
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Back in the day, this was a common form of amusement amongst Pokémon and children alike. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Ranged.

name: Rock Tomb
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The pokémon buries their foe prematurely, but it’ll be good practice for the real thing. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Ranged. Reduce the Target's Dexterity by 1.

name: Rock Wrecker
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A giant boulder is blasted like a cannon ball towards the target. Leaving a path of destruction and a subsequent explosion as the boulder crashes. Let the pokémon catch their breath afterwards. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Lethal. Ranged. Projectile Move. Must Recharge.

name: Role Play
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon is a great actor. Their impersonations are really good! ...maybe a bit too good. Single Target. Replace the User's Ability with the Target's. Whole Scene Duration. Unique Abilities can't be copied.

name: Rolling Kick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon jumps in the air and spins with one leg extended to land an impressive kick against their foe. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target.

name: Rollout
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 When the foe sees this Pokémon rollin’ they’ll be hatin’. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Successive Actions. *If all 5 actions land successfully, add 1 Extra Die to the Damage Pool of the last hit of this Move. If the Pokemon used the Move "Defense Curl" in the same round, this Move's base Power becomes 2.

name: Roost
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon gathers some twigs and builds themselves a comfy nest on the floor to roost and relax. Target Self. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate. Remove the User's Immunity to Ground-Type Moves. Duration 1 Round.

name: Rototiller
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon digs around the battlefield to soften the soil and make it ideal for harvest. Target Battlefield. Increase by 1 the Strength and Special of all Grass-Type Pokemon.

name: Round
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user attacks the foe with the power of music, if another one joins the performance, the musical harmony will rock their public! Single Target. Sound Move. *If the user and an ally are able to use Round. Both may choose to do it at the same time. If they do, add 3 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of both Pokemon.

name: Ruination
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon summons a disaster to befall onto their victim, few make it out alive, and those who do don’t stay that way for long. Single Target. Unique. Lethal. Roll Damage dice equal to the Target's Total HP. Ignore Defenses. This move will fail if the Target has been previously hit with this Move during the Battle.

name: Run Away
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Nope. Nope. Nope. Target Self. The User runs away from the Battlefield. This Effect ends the Battle. Foes may try to prevent this by rolling Dexterity + Athletic and scoring the same or more Successes. If the User is Blocked, this Maneuver fails.

name: Sacred Fire
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A blazing pillar of rainbow-colored flames crashes upon the foe, it burns and cleanses all evil from within. Those with a pure heart should not fear for they shall be unharmed. Single Target. Lethal. Unique. Roll 5 Chance Dice to inflict 3rd Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Sacred Sword
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user slashes at its target with a mighty blade. Theres no hide nor armor thick enough to resist its valorous steel. Single Target. Cutter Move. Ignore Defenses.

name: Safeguard
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A force field covers half of the battlefield and filters out all impurities and ill intentions coming from the other side. Target User's side of the Field. Force Field. Those affected are immune to all Status Ailements/Conditions. Previously inflicted Status Ailments/Conditions remain. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Salt Cure
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user covers the foe with a salt crust, the salt irritates the skin and drehydrates the victim. It can even rust metal in a few seconds. Single Target. Ranged. Ongoing Damage. Duration 4 Rounds. Steel-Type and Water-Type Pokemon receive Super-Effective Damage from this Move and 1 Extra Damage from the Ongoing Damage.

name: Sand Attack
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Sand to the eyes! A dirty tactic in more ways than one. Single Target. Reduce by 1 success to all the Accuracy Rolls of the Target.

name: Sand Tomb
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon creates a pit of shifting sand around the foe to bury it alive. The poor victim struggles for air as the sand keeps sinking it lower and lower. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Ranged. Blocks. Ongoing Damage. Duration 4 Rounds. Increase the Target's difficulty to Evade at Storyteller's discretion.

name: Sandsear Storm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 An overwhelming storm made of blistering sands rages through the battlefield, survivors describe it as being hit with live coal embers. Area Move. Low Accuracy 2. Lethal. Wind Move. Roll 3 Chance Dice to inflict 2nd Degree Burn on those affected.

name: Sandstorm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A fierce sandstorm starts raging all around the battlefield. Cover your eyes, nose and face! The rough sand will hurt you! Target Battlefield. Wind Move. Activate Sandstorm Weather. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Sappy Seed
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 From a magical bean, the user grows a cute stalk that will attach itself to the nearest target. Once it ingrains, it will grow and grow and grow until it reaches the sky. Single Target. Low Accuarcy 1. Ranged. Spend 1 Will point to activate. At the end of the Round, Roll 2 Dice of Typeless Damage against one target. Ignore Defenses. The User deals 1 HP for every damage dealt this way. If the user of this Move is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.

name: Savage Spin-Out
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Blocked, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Scald
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user shoots boiling water at the foe, immediately causing blisters. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to inflict 1st Degree Burn on the Target. If a Target is Out of Range due to using the Move "Dive", this Move hits anyways.

name: Scale Shot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon’s scales burst out as if they were shrapnel from a grenade. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Ranged. Successive Actions. *If all 5 actions land successfully, Increase the User's Dexterity by 1, and lower the User's Defense by 1.

name: Scary Face
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 When a Pokémon looks at you like THAT, you know you gotta thread carefully around them. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Dexterity by 2.

name: Scorching Sands
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The sand around the user heats to scorching temperatures as it is thrown against their foe. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to inflict 1st Degree Burn on the foe.

name: Scratch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses their sharp claws to scratch the enemy. Nothing fancy but it works. Single Target.

name: Screech
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A mighty screech will make the target cover its ears instead of covering its flanks. Single Target. Sound Move. Reduce the Target's Defense by 2.

name: Searing Shot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The User torches everything around itself in a sudden burst of scarlet flames. Everything is brought to cinders in a matter of seconds. Target All Foes in Range. Lethal. Projectile Move. Roll 3 Chance Dice to inflict 2nd Degree Burn on those affected.

name: Secret Power
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 There’s energy all around us, hidden secretly in the most incospicuous places. This Move makes use of that energy bringing the secret to light. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Inflict Status determined by the environment or active Terrain. See more on p. 530

name: Secret Sword
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 An invisible wave cuts through the target, you can feel its sharp edge but you cannot see it. Single Target. Cutter Move. Apply the Target's Defense instead of its Sp. Defense to resist the Damage from this Move.

name: Seed Bomb
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A giant seed is hurled against the target, the hit is not what knocks them down, the tree that explodes suddenly out of the seed is what does. Single Target. Ranged. Projectile Move.

name: Seed Flare
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Shaymin releases an explosion of pollen and seeds that the foe cannot shake off, leaving it vulnerable. Over time, these seeds will grow into gigantic trees of life. Single Target. Lethal. Unique. Roll 4 Chance Dice to Reduce the Target's Sp. Defense by 2.

name: Seismic Toss
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe gets launched up to the sky, then falls face-first into the ground making it tremble. The stronger the user, the higher the launch. Single Target. Roll Fight-Type Damage Dice according to the User's Rank: Starter 1 Die / Rookie 2 Dice / Standard 4 Dice/ Advacned 6 Dice / Expert 8 Dice / Ace and forward 10 Dice. Ignore Defenses.

name: Self Destruct
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 It’s not about winning or losing, some pokémon just want to see the world burn. Area Move. Lethal. Ranged. The User faints.

name: Shadow Ball
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Dark matter and shadows are used as a projectile against the foe, bringing out memories of their deepest fears. Single Target. Projectile Move. Roll 1 Chance Die to Reduce the Target's Sp. Defense by 1.

name: Shadow Bone
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The bone that this Pokémon uses as a weapon contains a spirit, that spirit may cling into a victim, creating openings for its master. Single Target. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Reduce the Foe's Defense by 1.

name: Shadow Claw
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses their ghostly claws to slash through their foe’s body tearing not their flesh but their soul directly. Single Target. Lethal. High Critical.

name: Shadow Force
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon dissapears into a dark dimension to strike its foe at the next opportunity. The blow will hurt the target not on their body but directly into their soul. Single Target. Charge move. Out of Range while Charging. Lethal. Unique. Ignore Defenses and any Shield Moves and Force Fields active on the Target. Damage dealt by this Move cannot be healed for 24 hrs.

name: Shadow Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon punches the air, inadvertently, their shadow delivers the punch through the foe’s own shadow. This move is impossible to predict. Single Target. Never Miss. Fist Move.

name: Shadow Sneak
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user sneaks through the darkness and strikes by coming out of the target’s shadow. The Pokémon is able travel freely through the shadow realm. Single Target. Reaction 1.

name: Sharpen
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 This Pokémon doesn’t smooth the rough edges, they make them sharper and sharper. Target Self. Increase the User's Strength by 1. *This effect can stack up to 3 times.

name: Shattered Psyche
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Activate Psychic Terrain, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Shed Tail
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sheds their tail and leaves it as a decoy while it retreats to safety and lets someone else deal with the threat. Target Self. Switcher Move for the User. Deal 2 Damage to the User. Put a Substitute Decoy with 2 HP and the same defenses as the user. See p. 531

name: Sheer Cold
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon reaches an absolute zero by being freezed from the inside out. Urgent medical attention is required. Single Target. Low Accuracy 5. Ranged. Deal Damage to the Target equal to its Remaining HP, plus 1 Lethal Damage.

name: Shell Side Arm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots slime ammunition from their cannon-like arm, or strike the foe directly with the cannon arm. They may find themselves out of ammo, but never out of options. Single Target. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Poison the Target. *If the User's Strength score is higher than their Special, this Move becomes Physical, using Brawl for accuracy and inflicting damage with Strength.

name: Shell Smash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon breaks off their own shell. The foe mistakenly believed the shell was for the Pokémon to protect themselves when it was actually there to protect the foes from what’s next. Target Self. Increase by 2 the User's Strength, Special and Dexterity. Reduce by 2 the User's Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Shell Trap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon apparently just buries underground, but secretly prepares their shell to detonate; anyone who steps on it will be blown to pieces. Single Target. Lethal. Late Reaction 3. This Move's damage is only rolled the next time the User is hit with a Non-Ranged Physical attack.

name: Shelter
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user uses a sturdy part of their body as a shelter to hide. It’s difficult for the foes to find an opening. Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Defense and Sp. Defense. Reduce 1 success to all the Accuracy Rolls of the Foes when targeting the User.

name: Shift Gear
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Once the Pokémon shifts to the fifth gear, nothing will stop them. Target Self. Increase the User's Strength by 1 and its Dexterity by 2.

name: Shock Wave
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A series of lightning bolts rise through the floor towards the sky, it is impossible to predict where they are coming from. Single Target. Never Miss.

name: Shore Up
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon gathers the sand around themselves to restore their body to shape. Target Self. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate. If performed under Sandstorm weather, this Move is a Complete Heal.

name: Signal Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots a buzzing beam that leaves makes the foe head towards bright lights like a dazzled moth. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Confuse the foe.

name: Silk Trap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon weaves a thread of silk around specific parts of their body, both as an armor and as a trap to snare their enemies. Target Self. Reaction 4. Shield Move. Reduce 3 Damage the User would receive from a Damaging Move. *If the Foe used a Non-Ranged Physical Move, against the user Reduce the foe's Dexterity by 2.

name: Silver Wind
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A beautiful but dangerous wind that blows a silver powder against the foe. The performance may give the user a big confidence boost. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance Die to Increase by 1 the User's Strength, Dexterity, Special, Defense, and Sp. Defense.

name: Simple Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A weak mental beam that doesn’t hurt or confuse the target but it does change their view of life as they start to take a simpler apporach to things. Single Target. Change the Target's Ability to "Simple". Whole Scene Duration. This effect does not end by switching out the affected Pokemon.

name: Sing
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sings a lullaby; the sound is so comforting that it evokes memories of being tucked in bed and kissed good night. Single Target. Low Accuracy 3. Sound Move. Put the Target to sleep.

name: Sizzly Slide
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user slides on the floor as if it was ice-skating, only there is no ice, only a raging fire. Single Target. Inflict 1st Degree Burn on the Target. If the User of this Move is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.

name: Sketch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon draws a rough sketch of their target performing a Move and through their art studies they manage to learn that same Move in the process. Single Target. Copy Move. Replace "Sketch" with the copied Move. Permanent Duration.

name: Skill Swap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon enters their foe’s mind to assimilate the traits of that species while make the foe think it is a member from another species. The foe gets an identity crisis afterwards. Single Target. Switch the User's Ability with the Target's. Whole Scene Duration. This affect does not end by switching out the affected Pokemon. Unique Abilities can't be switched.

name: Skitter Smack
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon stalks and strikes the foe, usually from behind bushes or any sort of cover. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Special by 1.

name: Skull Bash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user withdraws into their shell, after a few seconds of them not moving, the foe goes to inspect and the user pops their head out in in a devastating strike. Single Target. Charge Move. While this Move is charging, Increase the User's Defense by 1.

name: Sky Attack
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 In a graceful but lethal strike, the Pokémon takes a deep dive towards the foe as if the sky was falling down right on top of it Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Charge Move. High Critical. Lethal. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target.

name: Sky Drop
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon clutches their foe and starts flying up high, then drops the foe from a decent altitude. Let gravity handle this one. Single Target. Charge Move. Out of Range while Charging. Vulnerable while charging to: Thunder / Twister / Sky Uppercut / Gust / Hurricane / Smack Down. Flinch Target. If Target is Flying-Type or too heavy to carry, this Move fails. See Strength chart on p. 532.

name: Sky Uppercut
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user attacks with an uppercut, throwing the foe skyward with lots of force. Even flyers are not safe from this attack. Single Target. Fist Move. Low Accuracy 1. If the Target is Out of Range due to using "Fly", "Bounce" or "Sky Drop" this Move hits anyways.

name: Slack Off
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Some Pokémon fight by giving their maximum effort all the time, they are doing it wrong. Target Self. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate.

name: Slam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Everybody get up, it’s time to slam now. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1.

name: Slash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses the sharpest part of their body as a blade to tear and slash with vicious intent. Single Target. Lethal. High Critical. Cutter Move.

name: Sleep Powder
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon spouts a cloud of somniferous pollen to know out their foe, the only problem is that the foe must inhale enough of the pollen for it to take effect. Single Target. Low Accuracy 3. Powder Move. Put the Target to Sleep.

name: Sleep Talk
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Despite being asleep, the Pokémon keeps dreaming about the battle. They talk incoherences and even sleep walk. If the user is not asleep, this Move fails. Instead of making a roll to try to wake up, the user may choose to use Sleep Talk instead. Choose a Move on the user's Move set at random and Target Random foe with it. Sleep Talk can be repeated up to 5 times per Round.

name: Sludge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 What is it with these Poison Types and covering their victims with all kinds of organic waste?! Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Poison the Target.

name: Sludge Bomb
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 An explosive burst of organic waste directly into the target’s face. Nerves of steel are required not to throw your breakfast afterwards. Single Target. Projectile Move. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Poison the Target.

name: Sludge Wave
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A wave of black water spouts all around the user. It’s knee-high and rising. Fighting in such unsanitary conditions is not a good idea. Area Move. Roll 1 Chance Die to Poison those affected.

name: Smack Down
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 They say it’s great to get two birds with one stone, this Pokémon will give one bird ALL the stones. Single Target. Ranged. Remove the Target's immunity to Ground-Type Moves. If the Target is Out of Range due to using "Fly", "Bounce" or "Sky Drop", this Move hits anyways.

name: Smart Strike
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user stabs the foe using one of their sharp horns with astounding precision. The resulting wound is very deep and needs stitches immediately Single Target. Never Miss. Lethal.

name: Smelling Salts
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses strong smelling salts to purify the arena or to throw into the foe’s face. Any paralized Pokémon gets a sudden jolt at the powerfull smell. Single Target. *If the Target is Paralyzed, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move. After dealing damage, cure the Target's Paralysis

name: Smog
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon releases a stream of filthy gases. The foe may try to hold their breath, but for how long? Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Roll 4 Chance Dice to Poison the Target.

name: Smokescreen
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon covers the foe in a cloud of smoke to impair their visibility to make it easier to hide and/or cover their escape. Single Target. Reduce 1 success to all the Accuracy Rolls of the Target.

name: Snap Trap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user is so flat that you can barely see it in the tall grass. Waiting for an unsuspecting prey to get close enough to use its body as a snare trap. It won’t let go until its prey faints. Single Target. Blocks. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Snarl
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon viciously snarls showing its teeth to the foes. This menacing look will make everyone cower in fear. Target all foes in Range. Sound Move. Reduce by 1 the Special of those affected

name: Snatch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user takes notice of the good stuff on the other side and quickly takes it for themselves. Finders keepers, losers weepers! Single Target. Reaction 6. Remove any Increase/Reduction on the Foe's Attributes, Active Shield Moves, Healing effects on the Foe, or effects on its side of the field; and place them on the User instead. See p. 531 for more info.

name: Snipe Shot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user shoots a piercing water jet with incredible precision. Single Target. High Critical. Ignore effects from Moves, Items or Abilities that would prevent this Move from targeting the foe.

name: Snore
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 While the Pokémon is asleep they start snoring so loud it startles the foe. Single Target. Sound Move. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target. If the user is not asleep, this Move fails.

name: Snowscape
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A heavy snowstorm sweeps through the battlefield, covering everything with a thick layer of snow. Target Battlefield. Activate Snowy Weather. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Soak
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe gets soaking wet, they should stay away from electric outlets and thirsty plants. Single Target. Change the Target's Type to Water. (ie Charizard was Fire/Flying, after this Move their Type will be Water) Whole Scene Duration. This effect does not end by switching out the affected Pokemon.

name: Soft Boiled
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 An over-easy egg for a healthy breakfast! Target Self. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate. Out of battle, this Move can be used on allies.

name: Solar Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon gathers sunlight but instead of being absorbed it is sot as a devastating beam of light instead. Single Target. Charge Move. If Sunny Weather is active, you skip this Move's Charge action. If performed under Rain, Sandstorm or Hail/Snowy Weather, this Move takes two actions to Charge.

name: Solar Blade
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon focuses the sunlight on its sharp leaves, then releases the energy with a shattering cut. Single Target. Charge Move. Cutter Move. If Sunny Weather is active, you skip this Move's Charge action. If performed under Rain, Sandstorm or Hail/Snowy Weather, this Move takes two actions to Charge.

name: Sonic Boom
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon makes use of a small but very destructive shock that goes through any wall, layer or wall. Single Target. This Move always inflict 1 Typeless damage. Ignore Defenses, Force Fields, Shield Moves, Cover, Out of Range, Type or Ability that would prevent this damage.

name: Spacial Rend
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With a flicker of its claws, Palkia defragments the space around its foe. Those who survive rarely do preserve their original shape much less move or fuction as they should. Single Target. High Critical. Lethal. Unique. If successful, reduce 5 Success from all Accuracy rolls of the Target. Whole scene duration.

name: Spark
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user engulfs itself with statc electricity then charges with a solid tackle against the foe. Sparks fly, very literally. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Paralyze the Target.

name: Sparkling Aria
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sings a beautiful melody, the song comes out as a sparkling fountain, bursting upon impact and quenching any fire in its path. Area Move. Sound Move. *If an effected Pokemon had any level of Burn Status Condition, heal it instead of dealing damage.

name: Sparkly Swirl
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon unleashes a swirling and glittery energy that releases a pleasant aroma that soothes the body and has healing properties. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Heal any Status Ailment on the User and Allies in Range. If the user of the Move is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.

name: Spectral Thief
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through the shadows, the user sneaks on its target to steal its life force and consume it, leaving the victim with a sense of grief and loss. Single Target. Unique. Before the User deals damage with this Move, steal all Attribute Increases the Target may have. Reduced Attributes on the Target remain.

name: Speed Swap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 This move allows the user to release its power. If the user has any boosts, the damage is increased. Single Target. Switch the User's Dexterity with the Target's.

name: Spicy Extract
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user dares their victim to eat a hot pepper, out of pride, the foe does and suffers as the pepper was double-loaded with spicy extract. Single Target. Increase the Target's Strength by 2. Reduce the Target's Defense by 2.

name: Spider Web
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon moves stealthily and without raising suspicion. By the time the enemy realizes it, the entire field is covered in cobwebs. Target Foe's Side of the Field. Entry Hazard. Blocks. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Spike Cannon
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots wave after wave of hundreds of tiny spikes. Single Target. Ranged. Successive Actions. Projectile Move.

name: Spikes
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Sharp and pointy spikes are scattered around the field, if you don’t watch your step the spikes will dig on your feet. Target Foe's Side of the Field. Entry Hazard. Pokemon entering the battle Receive 1 Typeless Damage. This effect does not stack. Pokemon with immunity to Ground-Type Moves are not affected.

name: Spiky Shield
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon bunkers themselves inside a shield of thorned brambles sprouting from the ground. Anyone who gets too close will get tangled in the spiky vines. Target Self. Reaction 3. Shield Move. Reduce 3 Damage this Pokemon would receive from a Damaging Move. If the Foe used a non-ranged Physical Move. Roll 2 Dice of Typeless Damage against it, ignore defenses.

name: Spin Out
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon spins against the target, with it pinned on the ground. This devastating Move leaves the Pokémon too tired to spin a lot more. Single Target. Lethal. Reduce the User's Dexterity by 2.

name: Spirit Break
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Sticks and stones may break your bones but words will too. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Special by 1.

name: Spirit Shackle
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 While attacking, the user sneakily binds its foe’s shadow to the ground, restricting its movement and making it unable to escape. Single Target. Blocks. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Spit Up
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 After stockpiling, the Pokémon spits the stored energy as a mighty beam. The user returns to their original size afterwards. Single Target. The user must have previously used the Move "Stockpile", otherwise this Move will fail. Reduce by 1 the User's Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Spite
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The target feels overwhelmend by feelings of dread. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Will to 1 point. Reset any effects it got from spending Will Points.

name: Splash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Oh, for the love of Arceus... Target Self. No effect.

name: Splishy Splash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon rides a wave charged with electricity. It looks incredibly rad but it is also dangerous, as electrified water is not considered safe for surfing. Target All Foes in Range. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Paralyze those affected. If the user of this Move is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.

name: Spore
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A very potent somniferous spore. Dangerous to inhale as it could make you sleep for days. Single Target. Powder Move. Put the Target to Sleep.

name: Spotlight
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user points a focused light onto one of their allies. The ally can’t help but catch everyone’s attention into itself. Target One Ally. Reaction 3. All of the Foe's Moves will Target the Chosen Ally if able. Duration 1 Round.

name: Springtide Storm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The whole battlefield becomes engulfed in a maelstrom of emotion. Love and hate deal emotional damage to those unfortunate enough to be trapped into it. Area Move. Lethal. Low Accuracy 2. *Choose one: Roll 3 Chance Dice to increase by 1 the User's Strength, Special, Dexterity, Defense & Sp. Defense. Or, Roll 3 Chance dice to Reduce by 2 the affected Defense & Sp. Defense.

name: Stabilize An Ally
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Apply pressure! Give chest compressions! Suck out the venom! You are not losing anyone today! The User applies CPR and/or first aid to an unconcious Ally. Target won't receive Lethal Damage each hour anymore. Each Lethal Damage on the Ally reduces 1 Success to the Accuracy Pool of this Maneuver. This Move may only be attempted on the Target once per hour.

name: Stealth Rock
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon hides a trap of sharp rocks that are launched at the victim before they even realize what even happened. Target Foe's Side of the Field. Entry Hazard. Pokemon entering the battle Receive 1 Rock-Type Damage. This effect does not stack.

name: Steam Eruption
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 In less than a second, the sound of steam boiling over a raging engine thunders through the ears of the foe before it is shot up in the sky by a scalding geyser. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Lethal. Roll 3 Chance Dice to inflict 2nd Degree Burn on the Target.

name: Steamroller
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user curls up and rolls at full speed against the foe with the intention to swat them on the ground. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch Target.

name: Steel Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A concentrated ray of light that is capable of melting even the thickest steel plates. Unfortunately, the user is also made of steel. Single Target. Lethal. Recoil.

name: Steel Roller
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon rolls into a wheel, destroying anything in their path. Buildings come crashing down, forests are swept away and the soil is left as a blank slate. Single Target. Lethal. Can't be used if there is no Active Terrain (Grassy Terrain, Electric Terrain, etc.) on the Battlefield. Remove any active Terrain on the Battlefield.

name: Steel Wing
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon has weather-proofed wings that cut flying times, cut through the air, and, most importantly, cut through their foes. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Roll 1 Chance Die to Increase the User's Defense by 1.

name: Sticky Web
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon quickly covers the arena with a sticky web, newly arrived foes will have trouble moving with ease. Target's Foe's Side of the Field. Entry Hazard. Reduce by 1 the Dexterity of Foes that enter the battlefield. Pokemon with Immunity to Ground are not affected.

name: Stockpile
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon swells up like a balloon by storing power within themselves. This helps them bounce back a bit of the damage. Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Defense and Sp. Defense. Enables the use of the Moves "Spit Up" and "Swallow".

name: Stomp
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Stomping the foe with strong feet. Perfect to squish nasty little bugs. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Die to Flinch the Target. Targets under the effects of the Move "Minimize" are vulnerable.

name: Stomping Tantrum
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon throws a tantrum and stomps all over the place, it becomes worse if something has previously frustrated them. Single Target. *Add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move if the User failed the Accuracy roll of the last Move it performed. If the Target is out of range due to using the Move "Dig", this Move hits anyways.

name: Stone Axe
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon hacks at the foe with a furious stone axe. Pointy pebbles and rubble remain within the cut, making the foe start limping. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. High Critical. Cutter Move. Ongoing Damage. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Stone Edge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Obsidian shards are sent out against the foe. This rock may be brittle but is the sharpest in the world. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Ranged. Lethal. High Critical. Cutter Move.

name: Stored Power
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 This move allows the user to release its power. If the user has any boosts, the damage is increased. Single Target. *Add 1 Die to the Damage Pool of this Move for each Attribute increase the User has, up to a maximum of 7 total Dice. (eg The User has 2 increased Points of Defense, add 2 Damage Dice.)

name: Storm Throw
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user throws its foe with a special technique, the foe lands right on their weak spot. Single Target. This Move is always considered to be a Critical Hit and gets the proper Bonus for it.

name: Strange Steam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user releases an addictive and sweet-smelling steam. Do not be fooled as it is mildly toxic with nasty side-effects. Single Target. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Confuse the Target.

name: Strength
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon is very strong. If they concentrate they can strain their muscles to go well beyond their limits of strength. Single Target. Out of battle, double the Pokemon's lifting capacity.

name: Strength Sap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon looks for a weak point on its foe, then feeds on its vital energy. The foe is left feeling feeble. Single Target. Reduce Target's Strength by 1. Heal 1 HP to the user. If successful, spend 1 Will Point to activate.

name: String Shot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe gets tangled in a fine silk string shot by the user. This silk can also be used to make fine clothes. Targets All Foes in Range. Reduce by 1 the Dexterity of those affected.

name: Struggle
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Scuffle about and make every effort to deliver a blow. Single Target.

name: Struggle (Physical)
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Scuffle about and make every effort to deliver a blow. Single Target.

name: Struggle (Special)
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Scuffle about and make every effort to deliver a blow. Single Target.

name: Struggle Bug
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon sends a distress signal through its antennae to interrupt the foe’s concentration. Target All Foes in Range. Reduce by 1 the Special of those affected.

name: Struggle Throw
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Scuffle about and make every effort to deliver a blow. Single Target.

name: Stuff Cheeks
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon munches a berry but keeps half of it inside their cheeks. This looks adorable but it is actually a survival tactic to endure harsh winters. Target Self. If the user has a held Berry, it gains its effects, afterwards, Increase User's Defense by 2. The Held berry can still be used as normal.

name: Stun Spore
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A cloud of paralyzing pollen that affects the nerves and cramps the muscles of those who inhale it. Single Target. Low Accuracy 3. Powder Move. Paralyze the Target.

name: Submission
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon wrestles their foe to subdue it, but the foe will put up a fight before they let it happen. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Recoil.

name: Substitute
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon disappears in a poof of smoke. A decoy identical to the user takes their place in battle. The user keeps attacking from the shadows while the decoy serves as distraction. Target Self. Deal 2 damage to the User. Put a Substitute Decoy with 2 HP and the same defenses as the user. See p. 531

name: Subzero Slammer
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Roll 3 Chance Dice to inflict Frozen, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Sucker Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon takes advantage of their foe preparing to attack to unleash a dirty surprise blow. Single Target. Late Reaction 6. *This move can only be used as a Late Reaction; and only if the Target used a Physical or Special Move, otherwise it will fail.

name: Sunny Day
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon will call for the sun to shine brighter, increasing the heat of the arena. This Move doesn’t work at night, indoors, or underground/water. Target Battlefield. Activate Sunny Weather. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Sunsteel Strike
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 You suddenly stop in your tracks as you see a bright and blinding light coming towards you at great speed. You do not see what hits you before it’s all darkness. Single Target. Lethal. Unique. If anything on the foe's side would prevent this move frm dealing (Pokemon Type, Abilities, Shield Moves, Weather or Force Fields), ignore it. This Move cannot be Clashed.

name: Super Fang
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon jumps to bite a chunk off their Target with their mighty fangs. After each bite there’s less and less foe to take chunks off. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Bite Move. Roll Normal-Type Damage Dice equal to Half of the Target's remaining HP. Up to 10 Dice may be rolled this way. Ignore Defenses.

name: Supercell Slam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user charges itself, jumps up high, then free-falls to crash on the target at a high speed. Beware of not ending up crashing directly against the floor. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. If the Accuracy roll fails, Roll 4 Dice of Typeless Damage against the user, ignoring defenses.

name: Superpower
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon packs all their power in a single crushing strike. All this effort leaves them quite tired afterwards. Single Target. Lethal. Reduce by 1 the User's Strength and Defense.

name: Supersonic
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots a series of ultrasonic waves that mess with the foe by making it feel dizzy and disoriented. Single Target. Low Accuracy 3. Sound Move. Confuse the Target.

name: Supersonic Skystrike
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Attribute Decrease, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Surf
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon calls forward a large wave of seawater to ride, most Pokémon get washed out as they did not bring a surfboard. Area Move. If a Target is out of range due to the Move "Dive", this Move hits anyways. Out of battle, allows the Pokemon to travel the sea for long distances.

name: Surging Strikes
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The ultimate technique from the swift “Water Style”. The User flows and smashes like waves striking a cliff. Single Target. Successive Actions. Unique. This Move is always considered Critical Hit and gets the proper bonus for it.

name: Swagger
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon’s arrogant and mocking attitude enrage their foe and make it lose focus in battle. Single Target. Increase the Target's Strength by 2. Confuse the Target.

name: Swallow
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 After stockpiling, the Pokémon swallows the energy to restore their health, they go back to their normal size afterwards. Target Self. The user must have previously used the Move "Stockpile", otherwise this Move will fail. Complete Heal, if successful, spend 1 Will point to activate. Reduce by 1 the User's Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Sweet Kiss
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon timidly approaches the foe and plants a delicate kiss on its cheek then quickly retreats giggling. The foe struggles to understand the meaning of this. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Confuse the Target.

name: Sweet Scent
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon releases a sweet aroma that lulls their enemies into a false sense of security Target All Foes in Range. Those affected cannot Evade Moves. Out of Battle, it will attract wild Pokemon.

name: Swift
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots a burst of star-shaped sparkles at a blinding speed. Target All Foes in Range. Never Miss.

name: Switcheroo
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses a bit of sleigh of hand to switch their Held Item with the target’s, who don’t even notice what happened. Single Target. The User and the Target switch their Held Item. If only one Pokemon is holding an Item, it gives it away.

name: Swords Dance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon dances with strong steps and a fierce attitude as a ritual to prepare for battle. Target Self. Increase the User's Strength by 2.

name: Synchronoise
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Each type of energy is contained by a thin layer of particles. With the right vibration frequency, that thin layer can be shattered like glass. Area Move. Sound Move. Choose one Type (Fire, Poison, Steel, etc.). This move only affects those with that Type.

name: Synthesis
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon gathers sunlight to re-energize themselves. Target Self. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will Point to activate. If Sunny Weather is in effect, this Move becomes a Complete Heal. If performed under Rain, Sandstorm, Hail or Snowy Weather, this Move is a Minor heal and only heals 1 HP.

name: Syrup Bomb
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon spits out a red syrup on their foe; as the syrup hardens the movement of the foe becomes impaired until they become a sweet caramelized statue. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Projectile Move. Reduce the Target's Dexterity by 1. *This effect can stack up to 3 Times.

name: Tachyon Cutter
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon swings with a sword so sharp, it cuts twice. Single Target. Cutter Move. Lethal. Never Miss. Double Action.

name: Tackle
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user charges to tackle their foe, it gets the job done. Single Target.

name: Tail Glow
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user emits a strong light. This Pokémon will stare at its own brightness to enter a trance. Target Self. Increase the User's Special by 3.

name: Tail Slap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses their tail to repeatedly slap their foe’s face. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Successive Actions.

name: Tail Whip
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon whips their tail in such an adorable way the foes let their guard down. Target All Foes in Range. Reduce by 1 the Defense of those affected.

name: Tailwind
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Flying Pokémon know better than anyone how to use the wind in their favor. Let its draft carry you to victory. Target User's side of the Field. Wind Move. Increase by 2 the Dexterity of everyone on the User's side of the field. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Take Down
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through a reckless grapple, the Pokémon smashes the foe into the ground, usually falling along with it. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Recoil.

name: Take Heart
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 There’s something only you can do so that this blue planet doesn’t lose it’s light. Believe in yourself and show your brave heart. Target Self. Heal any Status Ailment on the User. Increase by 1 the User's Special and Sp. Defense.

name: Tar Shot
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon gushes a blob of black tar over its foe. The unfortunate victim can barely move afterwards, keep it away from fire sources, tar is extremely flammable. Single Target. Reduce the Target's Dexterity by 1. For the Whole Scene, Fire-Type Moves deal Super-Effective damage against the Target.

name: Taunt
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through tease and mockery, the foe is enraged to the point it stops thinking clearly. Single Target. The Target cannot perform Support Moves (Support Maneuvers may still be performed). Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Tearful Look
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon’s eyes start watering as if it were about to cry, it’s foe is moved by the tears and loses its will to fight. Single Target. Reduce by 1 the Target's Strength and Special.

name: Teatime
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon gathers everyone for a cup of delicious tea, not eating a snack along with it would be a waste. Area Move. Those Affected will eat their held berries and berries on their Trainer's Bag without gaining their effects. Outside of battle, it will diffuse violent intentions for a few minutes.

name: Techno Blast
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A laser briefly beams away from the Pokémon, whatever it hits explodes a second later. This move can be modified with the right programing of a computer. Single Target. Lethal. *If Genesect is performing this Move, this Move's type may change to: Fire, Ice, Water, or Electric depending on the Driver it has as Held Item.

name: Tectonic Rage
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: Attribute Decrease, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Teeter Dance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon dances with wobbly movements and erratic spins. The spectators don’t know what to make of these modern choreographies. Area Move. Confuse those affected.

name: Telekinesis
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The target levitates from the ground as the user’s telekinetic powers prevent its movement. Single Target. Target becomes immune to Ground-Type Moves. Target can't Evade. Duration 2 Rounds.

name: Teleport
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Now you see me. Now you don’t. Target Self. Switcher Move for the User. Out of battle, Teleportation distances and limitations are determined by the User's Special Score and Storyteller's discretion.

name: Temper Flare
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon is a hot-head whose temper grows ever fiercer when dealing with frustration. Single Target. *Add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool of this Move is the User failed the Accuracy roll of the last Move it performed.

name: Tera Blast
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A blast of sharp crystals and Tera energy, if the Pokémon is Terastallized the energy’s type will change. It is something beautiful to witness. Single Target. *If the User is actively Terastallized, the Type of this Move changes to match that of the Tera-Type. This affects Weaknesses, Resistances and STAB accordingly.

name: Tera Starstorm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Tera crystals full of energy fall from the sky as meteors. A beautiful but extemely chaotic scene follows as all Pokémon absorb the Tera Energy without control. Target All Foes in Range. Unique Move. *If the User is actively Terastallized, the Type of this Move changes to match that of the Tera-Type, this affects Weaknesses, Resistances and STAB accordingly. Change the type of those affected at random.

name: Terrain Pulse
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user shoots a pulse that absorbs the energy flowing in the area to devastate its foes. Single Target. *Add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool if there is a Terrain active in the Battlefield. Change this Move's Type to match that of a currently active Terrain (ie Electric Terrain, Grassy Terrain, etc.).

name: Thief
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon hits their foe and seizes the moment to take some pocket change from its wallet as well. Single Target. The User steals the Target's Held Item. If the User already has a Held Item, this effect fails.

name: Thousand Arrows
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Out of nowhere, pointy shards come raining from the sky towards the foes. Even flying creatures will fall to the ground if they are knocked by them. Take cover, this is gonna hurt. Target All Foes in Range. Ranged. Lethal. Unique. Ignore the Target's immunity to Ground. Remove the immunity to Ground-Type Moves of those affected. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Thousand Waves
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Solid ground becomes a sandtrap, cracked earth will close to ensnare your feet. It’s as if the land itself wanted to trap you. There is no attacker nor escape in sight. Target All Foes in Range. Ranged. Unique. Blocks. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Thrash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon becomes a wild thing and the rumpus has started. Target Random Foe. Rampage.

name: Throat Chop
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A heinous attack to a Pokémon’s throat that will leave them unable to make a sound for hours. Single Target. The target cannot use any "Sound Based" Move. Whole Scene Duration. This effect does not end by switching out the affected Pokemon.

name: Thunder
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon commands the skies to send a giant lightning bolt to a specific point. Difficult to command under clear skies, lethal during a storm. Flying Pokémon are specially vulnerable. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Lethal. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Paralyze the Target. Rain Weather eliminates Low Accuracy. Sunny Weather increases it to Low Accuracy 4. If the Target is Out of Range due to using "Fly", "Bounce", or "Sky Drop" this Move hits anyways.

name: Thunder Cage
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Several lightning spheres are placed in the battlefied as if they were a tesla coil. Shooting thunderbolts non-stop and blasting those unfortunate enough to be trapped in it. Single Target. Blocks. Ongoing Damage. Duration 4 Rounds. Increase the Target's difficulty to Evade at Storyteller's discretion.

name: Thunder Fang
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon bites the foe with charged fangs, basically injecting electricity right into the foe’s nervous system. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Bite Move. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Paralyze the Target.

name: Thunder Punch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A charged punch to deliver a shocking blow. Single Target. Fist Move. Roll 1 Chance die to Paralyze the Target.

name: Thunder Shock
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The most basic electric attack, charge, release, and shock! Just don’t point it to any electric device. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance die to Paralyze the Target.

name: Thunder Wave
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A series of electric waves hit the target, their voltage is too weak to cause much harm but muscles will get cramped for hours. Single Target. Paralyze the Target.

name: Thunderbolt
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A solid electric shock. A discharge of nearly 10,000 volts that can knock out most foes and destroy electrical devices. Single Target. Roll 1 Chance die to Paralyze the Target.

name: Thunderclap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon summons lightning from the sky. A foe gathering energy makes for the perfect rod for lightning to be attracted to it. Single Target. Reaction 6. *This Move can only be used as a Reaction and only if the Target used a Physical or Special Move, otherwise it will fail.

name: Thunderous Kick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user splits open the field with a single lightning-fast kick. Even bystanders are sent flying away by the powerful shockwave. Single Target. Reduce Target's Defense by 1.

name: Tickle
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Whoever said laughter is the best therapy lied. Single Target. Reduce by 1 the Target's Strength and Defense.

name: Tidy Up
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user coordinates a quick and efficient way to clean up the whole place. No things scattered on the floor, no toys out of the toybox. Perfect for when visits come over. Target Battlefield. Remove all active Substitute/Shed Tail Decoys and Entry Hazards (ie Sticky Web, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, etc.). Increase the User's Strength and Dexterity by 1.

name: Topsy-Turvy
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Though clever manipulation the Pokémon switches their foe’s morality compass. Bad things become good and bad things become bad. Single Target. Increased Attributes on the Target become Reductions instead and vice versa.

name: Torch Song
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Through a sweet melody the foe burns a haunting memory into those who harbor ill intent. Single Target. Sound Move. Increase the User's Special by 1.

name: Torment
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon bullies their foe to the point of torment where they cannot keep using their strategy without feeling bad about it. Single Target. The Target cannot use any of the Moves it used during the last Round. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Toxic
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 This burning acid dissolves skin to enter the bloodstream directly. The poor victim feels like they are melting from the inside out. The clock is ticking. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Badly Poison the Target.

name: Toxic Spikes
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon lays a trap of tiny venom-drenched spikes through the battlefield. The battle has not yet begun and the foes are already defeated. Target Foe's side of the Field. Entry Hazard. Foes who enter the battlefield become Poisoned. Roll 1 Chance Die for them to become Badly Poisoned instead. Pokemon with immunity to Ground-Type Moves are not affected.

name: Toxic Thread
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user shoots a sticky thread that entangles around the foe, the thread is also laced with a potent toxin that will poison the foe on contact. Single Target. Reduce Target's Dexterity by 1. Poison the Foe.

name: Trailblaze
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 With their nimble footwork. the user leaps out of the tall grass to take the foe by surprise. Single Target. Increase the User's Dexterity by 1.

name: Transform
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon modifies their own DNA structure and becomes an identical clone to any Pokémon, creature or object it can see. Some clones keep their funny eyes. Target Self. Unique Move. The User transforms into a copy of a chosen Target. It has the same Ability, Attributes, Attribute Increases and Reductions, and Moves, keeping Transform. Whole Scene Duration.

name: Tri Attack
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe has three problems and this Move is all of them. Single Target. Roll 2 Chance Dice to inflict 1st Degree Burn on the Target. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Freeze the Target. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Paralyze the Target.

name: Trick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user controls its target’s mind to make them do a simple non-hostile action, such as walking or handing an item. Although some Pokémon use simple sleigh of hand. Single Target. The User and the Target switch their Held Item. If only one Pokemon is holding an Item, it gives it away.

name: Trick Room
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Reality inside the battlefielfield is distorted, time bends and flows differently for everyone. Those who don’t rush through manage to adapt easier. Target the Battlefield. Invert the order of Initiative. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Trick-Or-Treat
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user invites their foe to go trick-or-treating. The foe puts on a ghost costume that cannot be removed without an exorcism or help from the Pokémon center. Single Target. Add the Ghost Type to the Target's Type. (ie Pikachu will now be "Electric/Ghost", Charizard will not be "Fire/Flying/Ghost") If the Target already has a third Type attached, replace it.

name: Triple Arrows
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Three fast arrows shot in succession. The Pokémon who manages to land all three in the exact same spot has become a true sniper. Single Target. Ranged. Triple Action. Reduce the foe's Defense by 1. *If All 3 hits land, all of the User's Physical and Special Moves now have the "High Critical" Effect, this effect has a whole scene duration.

name: Triple Axel
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A series of cold-blooded kicks that break bone as they would break brittle ice. Single Target. Triple Action. *Add 1 Extra Die to the Damage of the 2nd hit and 2 Extra Dice to the Damage of the 3rd hit. **Second hit has Low Accuracy 1. ***Third hit has Low Accuracy 2.

name: Triple Dive
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user performs a triple dive jump with perfect timing. The foe is washed away by each water splash. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Triple Action.

name: Triple Kick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The good ol’ one-two with an even better twist! They never see that last hit coming. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Triple Action. *Add 1 Extra Die to the Damage Pool of the third hit.

name: Trop Kick
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user strikes with an intense and alluring kick. Single Target. Reduce Target's Strength by 1.

name: Trump Card
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 You can’t give up until you have given your all. And just as everyone thinks you are done for, you still the last card in your hand. Single Target. *If the User's Will Points are at half or less, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage pool. **If the User's Will points are depleted, add 8 Extra Dice to the Damage pool of this Move instead.

name: Twin Beam
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon shoots a beam, and as if had a mind of its own, another part of their body also shoots a beam along. Single Target. Double Action.

name: Twineedle
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon makes a double stab using a poison-infused sting, claw, or spikes. Single Target. Ranged. Double Action. Roll 2 Chance Dice to Poison the Target each hit.

name: Twinkle Tackle
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Single Target. Suggested effects: In Love, Attribute Increase, Damage Increase See p. 610 for more info.

name: Twister
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A raging twister embedded with a dragon’s fury. No one wants to be trapped in this fearsome spiral, which almost touches the sky. Target all foes in Range. Wind Move. Roll 2 Chance dice to Flinch those affected. If the Target is Out of Range due to using "Fly", "Bounce" or "Sky Drop" this Move hits anyways.

name: U-Turn
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A bait and switch move, where the user strikes then makes a sudden u-turn back to safety. Single Target. Switcher Move for User.

name: Upper Hand
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The battle is over when you’ve got the high ground, but the foe refuses to acknowledge it. Single Target. Reaction 3. *If this Move is used as a Reaction to another Reaction, Flinch the Target.

name: Uproar
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Shouts, screams, and loud music... What does a Pokémon have to do here for a peaceful night of sleep? Target Random Foe. Sound Move. This Effect Targets the Battle Field: Pokemon will be cured of the Sleep Status. Duration 1 Round.

name: V-Create
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user slams its foe with a V-Shaped flame on its forehead, upon impact, it detonates a terrible explosion and leaves the user pretty vulnerable afterwards. Single Target. Unique. Reduce by 1 the User's Dexterity, Defense and Sp. Defense.

name: Vacuum Wave
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Using their chi as a vacuum, the Pokémon pulls the foe closer, the foe gets hurt by the sudden force wave on its body Single Target. Reaction 1.

name: Veevee Volley
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Long sessions playing Volley ball with your Pokémon make it very happy. During battle, it just replaces the ball with a foe. Single Target. *Add 1 Extra Die to the Damage Pool of this Move for every point of Happiness on the User, up to 5 Dice may be added this way. If the user of this Move is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.

name: Venom Drench
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user weakens the foe’s already compromised immune systems. Target All Foes in Range. *If the affected are already Poisoned or becomes Poisoned in the same Round this Move was used, Reduce by 1 their Strength, Special and Dexterity.

name: Venoshock
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon identifies the weakest prey and makes an opportunistic shot. Single Target. *If the Target is already Poisoned, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool.

name: Vice Grip
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon traps the foe with its pincers or jaws and applies pressure that will leave a nasty bruise. Single Target. Lethal.

name: Victory Dance
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user dances spelling the letters “EZ” in a display of overconfidence. Encouraging their foes to either get good or give up already Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Strength and Defense. Add 1 Die to the User's Damage Pool for all Non-Ranged Physical Attacks.

name: Vine Whip
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses its body vines to give the foe a good smack. These vines can be as long as 20 feet and quite surdy as ropes. Single Target.

name: Vital Throw
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 You don’t need to go to the enemy, let them come to you. Single Target. Late Reaction 1. Never Miss.

name: Volt Switch
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user shoots a wave of electric rings that allow it to reteat to safety at the speed of lightning. Single Target. Switcher Move for the User.

name: Volt Tackle
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon charges their most powerful electric attack but instead of releasing it, they run at top speed to crash agains their foe with it. Single Target. Recoil. Roll 3 Chance die to Paralyze the Target.

name: Wake-Up Slap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 Wakey wakey, sleepy head! Single Target. *If the foe has the Sleep Status, Add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool. Wake up the foe after dealing damage.

name: Water Gun
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The fastest water gun in town. No enemy will remain dry Single Target.

name: Water Pledge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon chants to invoke the power of water. Moisture in the air bends the light to create a rainbow to bring good fortune. Everyone in the field feels luckier for a while. Area Move. This Effect Targets the Battlefield: Add 2 Dice to all Chance Dice rolls of everyone in the field. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Water Pulse
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user sends out a pulsing ring of water that blasts the foe with ultrasonic waves. For a while, everything seems as if reflected in the water ripples. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Confuse the Target.

name: Water Shuriken
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The best ninjas attack swiftly and undetected, after the deed is done, no evidence is left but an inconspicuous puddle of water. Single Target. Reaction 1. Successive Actions.

name: Water Sport
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A single drop of water can’t put off a raging fire, but what is the ocean but a collection of drops. Target Battlefield. Physical & Special Fire-Type Moves have Power 0. Pokemon weak to Fire-Type Moves won't receive Super-Effective Damage from them. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Water Spout
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 This Move alone may be the reason the earth is 70% water. Target All Foes in Range. Lethal. *Reduce 1 Die from the Damage Pool for every missing HP the User has. Up to 5 Dice may be removed this way.

name: Waterfall
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon swims with such force and speed that it could even swim upwards in a waterfall. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target.

name: Wave Crash
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon rides a tsunami-like wave an slams it against its target. The crash is very destructive and the Pokémon may end up falling from the ride. Single Target. Recoil. Reduce User's Dexterity by 1.

name: Weather Ball
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A ball created out of the forces of the weather. Today’s forecast is cloudy with a chance of pain! Single Target. Projectile Move. *If there is a weather condition on the field, add 2 Extra Dice to the Damage Pool. This Move's type will change according to the Weather. Sun/Fire, Rain/Water, Hail or Snow/Ice, Sand/Rock, Wind/Flying.

name: Whirlpool
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The foe is swallowed inside of a violent swirling whirlpool. Trapping them on the violent currents, barely managing to stay afloat. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Blocks. Ongoing Damage. Increase the Target's difficulty to Evade at Storyteller's discretion. Duration 4 Rounds. If a Target is out of range due to using the Move "Dive", this Move hits anyways.

name: Whirlwind
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A strong whirlwind can send you flying away to who knows where. You better be wearing your red shoes. Single Target. Late Reaction 6. Wind Move. Switcher Move for the Foe. In the wild, the battle may end.

name: Wicked Blow
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The “Dark Style” is known as the most deadly and vicious of battle techniques. The user mastered this style and their punches are wicked strong. Single Target. Lethal. Fist Move. If the Accuracy Roll is successful, this Move becomes a Critical Hit.

name: Wicked Torque
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user torques out their victim at a high speed with such force they may simply drop unconscious. Single Target. Lethal. Ranged. Roll 1 Chance die to put th Target to Sleep.

name: Wide Guard
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses their whole body to provide shelter and protection to everyone they can. They are the rock on which others stand. Target User and Allies in Range. Reaction 3. Shield Move. Reduce 3 Damage the Targets would receive from Physical or Special Move. Negate the Added Effects of Any Moves on the Targets.

name: Wild Charge
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon surrounds itself with lightning then recklessly charges against their target. Single Target. Recoil. Roll 1 Chance die to Paralyze the Target.

name: Wildbolt Storm
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The whole battlefield becomes engulfed in a wild lightning storm. Leaving the safety of cover could be a fatal mistake. Area Move. Low Accuracy 2. Lethal. Wind Move. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Paralyze those affected.

name: Will-O-Wisp
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user calls upon an eerie blue flame made with the souls of the departed. They appear harmless until they have you surrounded. Single Target. Low Accuracy 2. Inflict 1st Degree Burn on the Target. Using this Move against the same Target increases the Burn Degree.

name: Wing Attack
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A classic flying technique, the user flies towards the foe and strikes using their wings. Single Target.

name: Wish
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 When you wish upon a star it makes no difference who you are, anything your heart desires will come to you. Target Self / Target One Ally. Basic Heal. If successful, spend 1 Will point to activate. This move has its effect at the beginning of the Next Round. If the User is switched it will heal whoever takes their place.

name: Withdraw
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon withraw into their shell for increased protection and to avoid unwanted interactions. Target Self. Increase User's Defense by 1.

name: Wonder Room
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The battlefield is now a space that puts the mind to the test. A resilient mind will be a resilient body, but if the mind is weak the body will feel frail and feeble. Target the Battlefield. Everyone on the Battlefield will have their Defense and Sp. Defense calculated with Insight instead of Vitality. If using Insight as Sp. Defense optional rule, swap the calculation. Duration 4 Rounds.

name: Wood Hammer
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon creates a giant wooden hamer and it uses it to smash the foe with such force the hammer also explodes into wood splinters. Single Target. Recoil.

name: Work Up
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon has spent a lot of time training and doesn’t miss the chance to show off their muscles and fitness. After the battle they share routines and tips with the other Pokémon. Target Self. Increase by 1 the User's Strength and Special.

name: Worry Seed
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user plants the seed of doubt and uncertainty on its foe. The foe becomes such a worrywart that they can’t even sleep at night. Single Target. Replace the Target's Ability with "Insomnia". Whole Scene Duration. This effect does not end by switching out the affected Pokemon.

name: Wrap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon swiftly entangles their foe in a squeezing lock to prevent their escape. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Blocks. Ongoing Damage. Duration 4 Rounds. Increase the Target's difficulty to Evade at Storyteller's discretion.

name: Wring Out
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon quite literally squeezes the life out of their foe. But to do this effectively they require to be in top condition. Single Target. Lethal. *Remove 1 Dice from the Damage Pool for every missing HP on the target. Up to 4 Dice may be removed this way.

name: X-Scissor
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses its scythes or clawa as if they were a pair of scissors to cut through the foe. Single Target. Cutter Move.

name: Yawn
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user yawns, the foe yawns, the trainers yawn... everyone should take a nap. Single Target. *If the Target has not been removed from battle at the beginning of the next Round, put it to Sleep.

name: Zap Cannon
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 A dreadful but erratic bombardment of electric explosions, getting hit would be devastating. Single Target. Low Accuracy 4. Lethal. Paralyze the Target. Projectile Move.

name: Zen Headbutt
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The Pokémon uses both their mental and physical prowess in a questionable yet effective “psychic” strike. Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the Target.

name: Zing Zap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user hurls itself as a zig-zaging ball of electricity that explodes on contact, this leaves the foe unable to move for a few seconds. Single Target. Roll 3 Chance Dice to Flinch the foe.

name: Zippy Zap
description: Pokerole-Data v3.0 The user zips and zaps from one place to another to strike the foe moving so fast it appears to be teleporting, leaving almost no time to react. Single Target. Reaction 2. This Move is always considered a Critical Hit and gets the proper Bonus for it. If the user of this Move is at its Final Stage of Evolution, this move fails.
